sharedPost.text:
Calling all Rebels / scavengers 
We need you would you like to be in the movies we are looking for 100 supporting artists (Extras) to join us next week and become part of the N.E.S.T. Project family 

19th to the 25th July 2026 filming Mosley Manchester 

Camp with the cast be apart of the apocalypse 

Message me for details we would love to see you there  everybody welcome ❤️😎☝️

THE MAKO

Ember Production NEST Project

Like ❤️ Tag ❤️ share ❤️

Please what’s app 

Simon Hall - +44 7894 943405

No phone calls 

You will have all information

https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/the-eight-saga-nest-project?utm_campaign=sharemodal&utm_medium=organicsocial&utm_source=facebook&fbclid=IwZnRzaATHRrBwZG9mA2ZkaWQWUKsRRJVhfDQFEQTQMzgoHqkJYiUNiGV4dG4DYWVtAjExAHNydGMGYXBwX2lkCjY2Mjg1NjgzNzkAAR6VeGlIHG4k2F1UU_UEvOcbW2b49dyet67DgkDZnNohavoFLxU56MDfT6jKdg_aem_p3AYZFzMgMR3kBXhPEvP3g

items.text:
CASTING CALL! BERLIN
Für unseren Abschlussfilm der @filmuni KONRAD WOLF suchen wir zwei junge Schauspieler, für unsere beiden Hauptrollen, die Brüder Vali & Benno.

Meldet Euch gerne über folgenden Link an: 

http://bit.ly/4oKiapo

Oder schreibt uns eine Mail an: castinglaerm@gmail.com 

Das Alter für Vali liegt zwischen 8 und 11 Jahren, bei Benno zwischen 9 und 13 Jahren.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

#casting

#shortfilm 

#berlin

#lookingforcast

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'FILMUNIVERSITĂT BABELSBERG KONRAD WOLF CASTING CALL für unseren 20-minütigen Abschlussfilm LÄRM (AT) suchen wir für unsere Hauptrollen zwei Kinder im Alter von 8 -12 Jahren. Swipe für mehr SwipefürmehrInfos Infos'

May be a graphic of text that says 'FILMUNIVERSITÄT BABELSBERG KONRAD KONRADWOLF WOLF INFOS Drehzeitraum: 14. 09. 2026 -27. 09. 2026 Drehort: Berlin & Brandenburg Produktion: Filmuniuversität Babelsberg KONRAD WOLF Da es sich um eine studentische Produktion handelt, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Kosten für Verpflegung und Anreise werden von uns übernommen. WORUM GEHT'S? Getrennt durch die Einweisung ihrer Mutter in eine psychiatrische Klinik kämpfen eine Mariann und ihre beiden Söhne auf ihre eigene Weise darum, ihre Familie zusammenzuhalten bis sie gemeinsam vor etwas stehen, das gr größer ist, als ihre Angst. Hier entlang zu den Rollenbeschreibungen'

May be an illustration of text that says 'TRĂUMERISCH, QUIRLIG, STUR -hat sich von klein auf immer ganz eigene Lösungen gesucht glaubt aubt fest daran, dass immer einen Weg gibt, seine Ziele zue erreichen leicht uberfodert bei unbeeinflussbaren Situationen -rasende Gedanken sorgen für ungewöhnliche Ideen ansteckende Fantasie und Humor FILMUNIVERSITÄT BABELSBERG KONRAD WOLF Rollentyp: Hauptrolle Spielalter: Spielalter:8-11Jahre 8-11 Jahre Geschlecht: Geschlecht:männlich männlich VALI'

May be an illustration of text that says 'Rollentyp: Rollentyp:Hauptrolle Hauptrolle Spielalter: 9. 9-13 13 Jahre Geschlecht: männlich FILMUNIVERSITÄT BABELSBERG KONRAD WOLF +4 BENNO SELBSTSTĂNDIG. LOYAL, VERNUNFTIG -Pflichtbewusst, funktioniert immer außerhalb der Schule fehlt ihm oft Mut, aus sich herauszukommen um sich -kümmert sich um alle außer selbst -packt zuhause zuverlässig mit an -übernimmt Verantwortung für Vali -hatte immer genug Raum selbst Kind zu sein -jetzt steht er auf der Schwelle zwischen Kinderwelt und Realität, in der er zu schnell erwachsen wird'

May be an image of text that says 'FILMUNIVERSITĂT BABELS BABELSBERG BABELSBERG SBERG KONRAD WOLF KONTAKT Wir freuen uns über Eure Bewerbung mit aktuellem Foto, Geburtsjahr und einem kurzen Vorstellungsvideo. Tragt Euch gerne über folgenden Link in unser Anmelde-Formular Anmelde- -Formulan ein: bit.ly 4oKiapo Bei Fragen Beliaganotsomssee oder Anregungen meldet Euch gerne per Mail unter: castinglaermagmail.com'

items.text:
CASTING CALL — FINAL ROLES
Music Video Shoot • July 24- LA area

We’re still looking for women who embody the following looks, personalities, and talents:

* The Intellectual – academic, bookish aesthetic, glasses welcome.
* The Bombshell Blonde – platinum blonde with striking, confident, glamorous energy.
* The Queer Muse – women from the LGBTQ+ community with a strong sense of individuality and authentic self-expression.
* The Nordic Beauty – Scandinavian-inspired features and effortless, natural elegance.
* The professional hip-hop dancers  

If you or someone you know fits one of these roles, we’d love to hear from you. Please send an email submission:

items.text:
📍 **POZNAŃ i okolice**

🎬 **Poszukujemy bohaterki kampanii społecznej Fundacji Studio Figura**

Fundacja Studio Figura realizuje kampanię społeczną poświęconą **hejtowi, dyskryminacji i ocenianiu ludzi przez pryzmat wyglądu**.

Do udziału w spocie poszukujemy **dziewczyny lub młodej kobiety w wieku 16–25 lat**, która z własnego doświadczenia wie, czym jest ocenianie, wyśmiewanie lub hejt związany z wyglądem – w tym z chorobą otyłościową lub nadmierną masą ciała.

🟠 Szukamy osoby, która chciałaby swoim udziałem pomóc innym i pokazać, że za wyglądem każdego człowieka kryje się historia, której często nie znamy. Pragniemy stworzyć spot, który skłoni do refleksji i pokaże, że słowa mogą ranić, a empatia i zrozumienie mają ogromną moc.

📍 Poszukujemy osoby:

• w wieku **16–25 lat,**

• otwartej na udział w nagraniu,

• która utożsamia się z przesłaniem kampanii i chce wspólnie z nami przeciwdziałać hejtowi oraz dyskryminacji.

Jeśli czujesz, że to coś dla Ciebie odezwij się do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, lub pozostaw komentarz!

Razem możemy sprawić, że choć jedna osoba poczuje się mniej samotna i bardziej zrozumiana. 🧡

#KampaniaSpołeczna #niehejtuj #zwiększanieświadomości

sharedPost.text:
WEŹ UDZIAŁ W NOWYM PROJEKCIE! 🎬

Ruszamy z castingiem do randkowego programu tv! Szukamy osób z 
charakterem, które nie boją się wyzwań, uwielbiają rozmawiać i chcą 
przeżyć niesamowitą przygodę przed kamerą. 🌟

Nasz program opiera się na autentycznych emocjach, spontanicznych 
reakcjach i interakcjach na żywo. Jeśli jesteś singlem/singielką i masz

w sobie „to coś” – czekamy właśnie na Ciebie!

👫 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✅ Kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-30 lat.
✅ Osób otwartych, komunikatywnych i przebojowych.
✅ Swobodnych przed kamerą i potrafiących ciekawie o sobie opowiadać.
✅ Osób o zadbanej aparycji, które są naturalne i autentyczne.
✅ Każdego, kto realnie chce poznać nowe osoby i nie boi się wyrażać 
własnego zdania!

Kluczowa jest dla nas Twoja energia i umiejętność prowadzenia ciekawej 
rozmowy. 💬

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Wyślij maila na adres: zgloszenia@castingstudio.pl

W treści zgłoszenia podaj:
1️⃣ Imię i nazwisko
2️⃣ Wiek
3️⃣ Numer telefonu do kontaktu
4️⃣ Dołącz 3 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz oraz sylwetka – wyraźne, bez

filtrów)

Nie zwlekaj! Daj sobie szansę na nowe znajomości i udział w wyjątkowym 
formacie. Może to właśnie Ciebie szukamy? 🌹✨

items.text:
We are pushing our Vegas stop to October 24th!! 

I anticipate this class filling up fast - please let me know if you are planning to register. 

McThunders take Las Vegas!!! 

Vegas - are you ready for the McThunder Extravaganza?!

The other workshops in the other cities sold out within a day, so please let me know if you are planning to register as soon as possible. Seats are reserved as payment is received.

McThunders Take Las Vegas will take place **Saturday, October 24th in Las Vegas, NV. **

 

We are super excited to be able to do this together and see some new and familiar faces. 

Sides and address will be sent out a week prior to the workshop.

Workshop will be held from 10am - 4pm with a little over a lunch break. Location TBD, will be sent a week prior to the workshop.

**WHO / WHAT:**** **Emmy nominated casting directors [A](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0736326/?ref_=nv_sr_srsg_0_tt_2_nm_6_in_0_q_angelique%20mid)[ngelique Midthunder](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0736326/?ref_=nv_sr_srsg_0_tt_2_nm_6_in_0_q_angelique%20mid) & [Marie McMaster](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm1874875/?ref_=nv_sr_srsg_0_tt_1_nm_7_in_0_q_marie%20mcmaster) are coming to Las Vegas with their viral "McThunder" workshop (an all-day intensive) where we work with actors one-on-one on both the art of acting for the camera and the craft of self-taping. We then conduct an in-depth Q&A where all actors' questions are answered in a casual conversational environment.* Our focus is to lift the veil on the casting process and help actors gain a greater understanding of how to succeed in today's film industry. * 

Space is limited! 

Cost: $300/actor 

To register: 

Submit payment to either PayPal, CashApp or Venmo links below.

Send either your Actor's Access link or headshot/resume (so we can choose appropriate sides for you) 

[http://paypal.me/MMcMaster](https://na01.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=http%3A%2F%2Fpaypal.me%2FMMcMaster&data=05%7C02%7C%7C324be419f19b45c58f8808ddc592896f%7C84df9e7fe9f640afb435aaaaaaaaaaaa%7C1%7C0%7C638883955334729417%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=qCy9bXoKvr1uovhFKe2uQDiVpt6oxpLjbgm3QGfbRZc%3D&reserved=0)

CashApp $McThunders

Venmo @Marie-McMaster-1

[(Angelique) Midthunder Casting](https://www.midthundercasting.com/): THE LOWDOWN [FX], RESERVATION DOGS [FX], IT: WELCOME TO DERRY [HBO], AMERICAN PRIMEVAL [NETFLIX], THE CURSE [Showtime / A24], EDDINGTON [A24], WALKER INDEPENDANCE [CW], RANSOM CANYON [NETFLIX]

+*UPCOMING: *LITTLE HOUSE ON THE PRAIRIE [NETFLIX] 

[(Marie) McMaster Casting:](https://mcmastercasting.com/) PLURIBUS [APPLE+], STRANGER THINGS [NETFLIX], BETTER CALL SAUL [AMC], THE HARDER THEY FALL [NETFLIX], BIG SKY [ABC], SICARIO, FLAMIN' HOT, TRAP HOUSE, OBLITERATED

*+UPCOMING:* COYOTE V ACME

*“This workshop is a learning experience. It is not an audition or employment opportunity. As such, when this class is over, I will not be taking home, nor be given access to your headshot, resume or any of your other promotional materials.”*

--

Marie A. K. McMaster, CSA                           Angelique Midthunder, CSA

(Casting Director)                                          (Casting director)

[http://mcmastercasting.com/](http://mcmastercasting.com/)                          [https:www.](https://www.midthundercasting.com/)[midthundercasting.com/](https://www.midthundercasting.com/)

items.text:
We have a few spots left for the Bad Acting Masterclass on August 8.
And yes guys, we’re going to act badly. On purpose.

Most actors become careful because they’re trying so hard to be good. But real freedom begins when you stop being afraid of getting it wrong. We’ll exaggerate, make ridiculous choices and push past self-consciousness - so something more instinctive, personal and authentic can emerge.

And once you’ve felt that contrast in your own body, you can finally recognize what truly GREAT acting actually looks and feels like.

August 8 at 1 PM ET

In person & Zoom

Sign up here: https://forms.gle/Sn6z3PM6bKkkzpV48  💜

items.text:
NOW BOOKING GUESTS
 FOR EPISODE 6: The Turning Point✨

Can't Make This Up Podcast – LIVE
Monday, July 27
7:00 PM PST | 10:00 PM EST
Please check your local times.

Every person has a story. Some make you laugh, some inspire you, and some leave you wondering and excited. 

We're looking for actors, comedians, authors, musicians, entrepreneurs, artists, creators, and everyday people with unforgettable true stories to share.

This isn't just a podcast, we’re a family, we’re building a community, it's a conversation, a chance to connect, promote what you're working on, and inspire others through your journey. Meet amazing new people and returning guests.

Want to join? 
Email 
icantmakethisupodcast@gmail.com

Please like, share, and tag someone who has an incredible story.

**Because the best stories... you really can't make up.** 🎬✨

🎩 ARE YOU SEARCHING FOR THE PERFECT HAT? 🎩

A new streaming series is looking for charismatic people who love hats—or are ready to try a completely new look!

Whether you’re a lifelong collector, wear a hat every day, or have always wanted help finding “the one,” we want to hear from you.

✨ Explore new styles
🎥 Take part in an upcoming production
🎩 Find a hat that fits your personality
🙋 Hat experts and first-time hat wearers are welcome!

APPLY HERE:
[https://forms.gle/e6hJeNa8qEvbKEFDA](https://forms.gle/e6hJeNa8qEvbKEFDA)

Questions? Contact:
[TheFieldTeamUSA@gmail.com](mailto:TheFieldTeamUSA@gmail.com)

Tag a friend who deserves the perfect hat!

Große Rabatt Aktion auf den ClarAct Schauspielworkshop 🥳🐝🐝🐝
Es gibt noch wenige freie Plätze!
Mit dem Gutscheincode „ferienpass“
erhaltet ihr einen 10€ Nachlass und zahlt nur noch 119,00€ !!!

Es wird auch in diesem Sommer wieder ein wunderbar bunter Schauspielworkshop mit ganz vielen tollen Überraschungen auf der Bühne! 🎭☺️🕴️

Sei dabei und starte voll durch als Schauspielerin und Schauspieler und verkörpere deine Traumrolle!🦄🏴‍☠️👮🧚🤺

Ich freue mich sehr auf euch! 

📍27./28. Juli, jeweils 10-13 Uhr
Kleine Aufführung für deine Gäste am zweiten Workshoptag☺️☺️🎭

Für Kinder von 5-14 Jahren

Hafencity Hamburg 

Infos und Anmeldung:
www.claract.de

items.text:
UNPAID call for extras (looking for 6-8)! 

**LOCATION**: Cafe in NYC Chinatown

**DATE: **Sunday, Aug 9, 3PM-12AM

**TYPE:** Indie short

**TITLE**: Vivian's Lament

**CONTACT:** vivianslament@gmail.com with headshot

**COMPENSATION**: Unpaid, but we can provide a small meal

**STATUS:** We'd have you sign SAG-AFTRA micro-budget agreements.

Current idea is extras would come through in different cohorts (e.g. 3PM cohort, 7PM cohort).

Potential actions: reading a book, being on a laptop, faux call, faux conversation with someone. We'd keep it very simple.

items.text:
❕CASTING CALL❕

FOULMOUTH Theatre is casting for an upcoming production and we’re looking for 4 male and/or non-binary performers with a playing age of 18 to 30 based in or around Manchester.

This is for a comedy that we’ll be announcing very soon. For now, we’re keeping the details under wraps, but we’re particularly interested in hearing from members of the LGBTQ+ community.

If you’d like to receive further information, please email your interest and a little bit about yourself to:

info@foulmouth.uk

with:
• Your name
• Your location
• A recent headshot
• Your Spotlight link (or acting cv)

The deadline for applications is 12PM ON MONDAY 22nd OF JUNE. We will not be accepting any applications past this time.

We’ll then send over the full casting information and audition details 🙂 We can’t wait to hear from you💋

#castingcall #casting #manchestercasting

items.title: ❕CASTING CALL❕

items.text:
**PAID SOCIAL MEDIA COMMERCIAL / SHORT FORM VIDEO CAMPAIGN**

CREW CALL: Director, Cinematographer, Editor, Producer

CASTING: Male & Female Actors, Ages 18-26, All Ethnicities

LOCATION: Los Angeles, CA

TIME(S): Accepting submissions now. Shoot dates TBD (July-August 2026)

CONTACT: team@joinswoo.com 

Swoo is a startup building a platform that helps college students make friends and discover events, activities, and communities around campus.

We are producing a series of cinematic 15-30 second social media videos focused on friendship, belonging, community, and authentic student experiences. The creative direction is closer to a short film than a traditional advertisement.

PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Seeking filmmakers with strong visual storytelling skills and actors who can portray natural, authentic college-aged characters.

Please send:
* Portfolio, reel, or previous work
* Role you are applying for
* Relevant experience
* Availability

Los Angeles-based applicants preferred. Thank you!

topComments.text: I’d be available to edit the commercial remotely and provide a decently quick turn around.

items.summary:
**PAID SOCIAL MEDIA COMMERCIAL / SHORT FORM VIDEO CAMPAIGN**

CREW CALL: Director, Cinematographer, Editor, Producer

CASTING: Male & Female Actors, Ages 18-26, All Ethnicities

LOCATION: Los Angeles, CA

TIME(S): Accepting submissions now. Shoot dates TBD (July-August 2026)

CONTACT: team@joinswoo.com 

Swoo is a startup building a platform that helps college students make friends and discover events, activities, and communities around campus.

We are producing a series of cinematic 15-30 second social media videos focused on friendship, belonging, community, and authentic student experiences. The creative direction is closer to a short film than a traditional advertisement.

PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Seeking filmmakers with strong visual storytelling skills and actors who can portray natural, authentic college-aged characters.

Please send:
* Portfolio, reel, or previous work
* Role you are applying for
* Relevant experience
* Availability

Los Angeles-based applicants preferred. Thank you!
items.title: **PAID SOCIAL MEDIA COMMERCIAL / SHORT FORM VIDEO CAMPAIGN**

Looking for flexible work to fit around studies, a second job or something to help top up your savings?  

Violet Inc. Promotions has the role for you! 

We are looking for shot sellers in 𝗟𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗼𝗼𝗹 With the most competitive rate of pay, you won’t find better pay in the industry  

𝗪𝗛𝗔𝗧 𝗔𝗥𝗘 𝗢𝗨𝗥 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗔𝗖𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗦 

𝗙𝗟𝗘𝗫𝗜𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦 - You choose, when you want to work, on a weekly basis so work fits around your current commitments. We only ask you to work a minimum of two Saturday per calendar month which makes the job perfect for fitting around your studies other work or your travels 

𝗙𝗔𝗦𝗧 𝗣𝗔𝗬 - Wages are paid within 24 hours of your shift finishing so no long wait for pay day 

𝗕𝗨𝗦𝗬 𝗩𝗘𝗡𝗨𝗘𝗦 - We work in the biggest and best venues in 𝗟𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗼𝗼𝗹! so we guarantee every shift is a good one and you’ll get the opportunity to work in a number of bars/clubs in your area 

𝗢𝗡𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗘 𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗜𝗡𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗗 - Before starting you’ll complete our online training courses so you are well equipped with all the knowledge to work with us and be a top shot seller! 

 

To apply please follow the link below to our website and then navigate to our Facebook recruitment hub

‼️ WARSZAWA LIPIEC ‼️
Przed nami ostatnie dni zdjęciowe!! Jest to ostatnia szansa aby wziąć udział w tym serialu 🙂 trzecia część kultowego serialu, którego fabuła rozgrywa się w latach 40:

▪️ 22.07 mężczyźni sprawni fizycznie jako pracownicy portowi, 1 scena stawka 120 (trzeba będzie nosić skrzynie) 

▪️ 22-23.07 mężczyźni jako technicy w laboratorium, stawka za dwa dni 270zł lub za jeden 120zł

▪️ 24.07 mężczyźni jako martwi żołnierze, stawka w zależności od godzin 110-130zł

▪️ 28.07 mężczyźni jako mundurowi i pracownicy cywilny, stawka w zależności od godzin 110-140zł

ZAKAZ ZAROSTU I DŁUGICH WŁOSÓW!!

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, wybranymi datami, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami sylwetki oraz włosów z boku oraz WYMIARAMI (wzrost, but, klatka i pas) przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując “PLAN”

topComments.text: Stawka jak dla bezdomnych... 😄

items.text:
Casting zdalny do lipcowych zdjęć TRUDNYCH SPRAW które odbędą się w terminie między 31 - 4 Sierpnia 
 Postacie do obsadzenia:

1. WERONIKA "szkoła piękność" 
Wiek 18-21 lat (Musi wyglądać na 17) 
Jest to główna rola, także proszę osoby z dużym doświadczeniem na planie 
Terminy zdjęć 31.07, 1 oraz 2 sierpnia 

2. Oliwer wiek 18-21 lat
 (Musi wyglądać na 17) 
Proszę tylko osoby z doświadczeniem na planie 
Terminy zdjęć 31.07, 1 sierpnia 

3.MAJKA wiek 18-21 lat 
(Musi wyglądać na 17)
Proszę tylko osoby z doświadczeniem na planie 
Terminy zdjęć 31.07, 01.08 sierpnia 

4. JAGODA wiek około 42
Proszę tylko osoby z doświadczeniem na planie oraz prawo jazdy.
Terminy zdjęć 31,1,2 sierpnia 

5. KATARZYNA wiek 42 lat 
Proszę tylko osoby z doświadczeniem na planie
Terminy zdjęć 31.07, 01.08 sierpnia 

6. MACIEJ około 43 lat 
Terminy zdjęć 31.07, 01.08 sierpnia 

7. DYREKTOR SZKOŁY około 48 lat.
Proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia i okolic.
Terminy zdjęć 1 sierpnia 

8. MAREK około 50 lat 
UWAGA rola kontrowseyjna. 
Terminy zdjęć: 2,3 sierpnia 

10 Genowefa wiek 60-70 lat 
Proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia lub okolic 
Terminy zdjęć 3 sierpnia 

11. WITEK około 43 lat 
Proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia i okolic 
Terminy zdjęć 2 sierpnia  

Wynagrodzenie płatne gotówką na planie po zakończeniu zdjęć. Zdjęcia odbędą się we Wrocławiu, a dla osób spoza Wrocławia zwracam koszty podróży oraz zapewniam hotel.

Osoby zainteresowane historią odcinka, wynagrodzeniem oraz informacją jak wziąć udział w castingu zapraszam do kontaktu na priv, bądź komentarz pod postem :)

Zgłoszenia można również wysyłać na emial adres 
adrian.zarzecki@polotmedia.pl z informacją wiek, jakie doświadczenie na planie, aktualne zdjęcia i numer tel.

Do zobaczenia na planie ;)

topComments.text: Zainteresowana
Zainteresowana- Jagoda

sharedPost.text:
WEŹ UDZIAŁ W NOWYM PROJEKCIE! 🎬

Ruszamy z castingiem do randkowego programu tv! Szukamy osób z 
charakterem, które nie boją się wyzwań, uwielbiają rozmawiać i chcą 
przeżyć niesamowitą przygodę przed kamerą. 🌟

Nasz program opiera się na autentycznych emocjach, spontanicznych 
reakcjach i interakcjach na żywo. Jeśli jesteś singlem/singielką i masz

w sobie „to coś” – czekamy właśnie na Ciebie!

👫 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✅ Kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-30 lat.
✅ Osób otwartych, komunikatywnych i przebojowych.
✅ Swobodnych przed kamerą i potrafiących ciekawie o sobie opowiadać.
✅ Osób o zadbanej aparycji, które są naturalne i autentyczne.
✅ Każdego, kto realnie chce poznać nowe osoby i nie boi się wyrażać 
własnego zdania!

Kluczowa jest dla nas Twoja energia i umiejętność prowadzenia ciekawej 
rozmowy. 💬

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Wyślij maila na adres: zgloszenia@castingstudio.pl

W treści zgłoszenia podaj:
1️⃣ Imię i nazwisko
2️⃣ Wiek
3️⃣ Numer telefonu do kontaktu
4️⃣ Dołącz 3 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz oraz sylwetka – wyraźne, bez

filtrów)

Nie zwlekaj! Daj sobie szansę na nowe znajomości i udział w wyjątkowym 
formacie. Może to właśnie Ciebie szukamy? 🌹✨

items.text:
CASTING CALL - Horror/Dark Comedy Short Film

An obsessive Canucks fan must break a curse which he believes connects his life to the Vancouver Canucks in all the wrong ways.

A film about what it’s like to be a Vancouver Canucks fan. 

Email your headshots, resume, and demo reel (if applicable) to canuck.movie@gmail.com and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for. If you’re a good match, we’ll send the sides over right away.

Read below for more information.

topComments.text: Would age 18 be ok instead of 19?

items.text:
CASTING CALL – PERFORMERS & PERSONALITIES
Music Video: "STRUT" by BEACHTITZ

Location: City Centre Motor Hotel – Vancouver, BC�Shoot Date: Monday, July 20�Time: Approximately 10:00 PM – 12:00 AM�Compensation: Unpaid (Professional Footage + Credit)

We're transforming a retro Vancouver motel into a bold, neon-soaked underground spectacle for the final scene of "STRUT."

This isn't a traditional party scene—it's a celebration of individuality, confidence, and people who own every room they walk into. Think rebellious glamour, underground nightlife, and unforgettable personalities.

We're casting:

* Drag queens

* Fire performers*

* Circus performers

* Stilt walkers

* Flow artists (LED, poi, hoops, fans, etc.)

* Burlesque performers

* Dancers (all styles)

* Roller skaters

* Alternative models

* Tattoo artists, musicians, and creatives with standout style

* Fashion-forward personalities

* Anyone with an unforgettable look and commanding presence

No acting experience is necessary. We're looking for people who are expressive, comfortable on camera, and excited to help create a visually iconic scene.

Wardrobe Inspiration

Think bold, glamorous, expressive, rebellious, high fashion, leather, sequins, latex, vintage, punk, queer nightlife, festival couture, or anything that makes you feel unstoppable. This is your chance to show up as your most confident self.

What You'll Receive

* Professional footage for your reel or social media

* Credit in the official music video

* The opportunity to collaborate with an incredible community of local artists

To Apply

Please send:

* 2–3 recent photos

* Your Instagram

* A brief description of what you do

* Performance photos or videos (if applicable)

DM myself or @BEACHTITZ

Or email breaschneidertalent@gmail.com with the subject line:

"STRUT – MOTEL TAKEOVER"

Let's build a scene that feels like Vancouver's wildest underground night never ended.

*Fire performers must be experienced professionals with their own safety equipment. Any fire performance will be subject to location approval, safety protocols, and production requirements.

topComments.text: For many of us, performing isn't a hobby, it's our profession. While footage can certainly be appreciated, asking professionals to work solely for content contributes to the idea that creative labour has no monetary value. Fair compensation helps sustain the artists who make these events memorable. In addition fire, aerialists, and professional performers require insurance to perform and that insurance is at a high cost.
Roller blades or skates?

items.text:
Casting Call!
 Models  for Kindness Campaign. 

💙 Models for Kindness 💙 By My Little Matilda Matilda Model Magazine Model Society Club Matilda Couture 

“Kindness never goes out of style.”

International models are coming together to promote kindness, compassion, and respect for one another through the Matilda Model Magazine Kindness Campaign.

Meet our inspiring ambassadors:

📅 July 19

📍 Billboard Location: Orlando, Florida

✨ The billboard will play for 8 seconds several times throughout the day in a high-traffic area near Walt Disney World and Universal Studios, reaching visitors from around the world.

Together, we’re proving that kindness is always in fashion. Join us in spreading positivity around the world—one act of kindness at a time. 💖

#ModelsForKindness #KindnessNeverGoesOutOfStyle #MatildaModelMagazine #KindnessCampaign #InternationalModels

items.title: Casting Call!

sharedPost.text:
✨ Walk the NYFW Runway Experience with Matilda Couture by My Little Matilda ✨

We invite aspiring models to be part of an unforgettable New York Fashion Week modeling experience on September 12th and 15th, as Matilda Couture by My Little Matilda presents its exquisite designs on the runway.

This is your opportunity to experience the world of fashion like a professional model — featuring professional hair and makeup, professional photography, and the excitement of walking a real NYFW runway in front of a live audience.

A garment fee applies for this exclusive runway experience.

Whether you dream of becoming a model or simply want to celebrate a special milestone, this is a memory you will cherish for a lifetime. Just like investing in a theater performance, a dance recital, or any meaningful artistic experience, modeling is a skill, an art form, and a beautiful opportunity to build confidence and create memories you can share with family and friends.

✨ Live the model life. Walk the runway. Create your NYFW story. ✨

Matilda Couture by My Little Matilda
Where dreams become couture.

#MatildaCouture #MyLittleMatilda #NewYorkFashionWeek #NYFW #ModelExperience RunwayModel AspiringModels FashionDreams CoutureFashion

sharedPost.text:
We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel :info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
SINGING LESSONS  -
VOICE PROJECTIONS LESSONS

I’m a professional vocal coach based in Cambridge, with a conservatoire background and many years of experience as a trained opera singer. I’ve had the opportunity to work with international performers and bring that same level of coaching to my students locally and online.

I offer private singing lessons for both children and adults, either face to face or online.

For children and teens, lessons focus on:

• Building confidence and enjoying singing

• Improving vocal range and control

• Learning proper breathing and projection

• Preparing for auditions or ABRSM exams

For adults, I also offer voice coaching for:

• Singing development

• Public speaking and presentations

• Improving clarity and projection

I work with all levels, from complete beginners to more experienced singers, and tailor each lesson to the individual.

If you’d like to see examples of my work, there are videos and more information on my website below.

Happy to answer any questions or have a quick chat to see if it’s a good fit.

📍 Cambridge (also online available)

📞 07854 924209

📧 sebarotti@yahoo.com.ar

🌐 sebastianembrel.co.uk

items.text:
**Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:**

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this.

topComments.text: Have the other roles mentioned in her relationship category been filled?
How are we supposed to contact you to apply 😕

items.text:
Casting do etiudy reżyserskiej — Warszawa (rola płatna)

Cześć! Do etiudy reżyserskiej poszukuję obsady (role żeńskie).

O czym to jest: Młoda kobieta z dość nietypowego powodu decyduje się wstąpić do zakonu. Myśl przewodnia: uważaj, czego sobie życzysz. Film porusza wątki religijne i może być odbierany jako kontrowersyjny — szukam osób otwartych na taką tematykę. To kino praktycznie bez dialogów (pure cinema) — cała gra opiera się na obecności, mimice i emocji, nie na słowie.

Szukam:

- Anna (główna rola, ok. 25 lat) — najwięcej pracy warsztatowej, tu najbardziej zależy mi na zaangażowaniu i otwartości na próby

- Zofia — nowicjuszka (25–35 lat)

- Dwie nowicjuszki (wiek dowolny) — dwie bliźniaczo podobne sceny zbiorowe

Produkcja:

- Zdjęcia w Warszawie, prawdopodobnie drugi tydzień sierpnia, jeden dzień zdjęciowy (kręcimy w dzień, część scen „na noc")

- Finalny film: ok. 6 minut

- Przed zdjęciami próby — dzień zdjęciowy to powtórzenie tego, co wypracujemy wcześniej. Szukam osób realnie otwartych na proces prób.

Warunki: rola płatna — honorarium na poziomie produkcji studenckiej (to niezależna etiuda, nie duża produkcja). Zapewniam wyżywienie na planie, umowa.

Zgłoszenia: wyślij na piotr.rezmer+casting@gmail.com (lub w wiadomości prywatnej):

- aktualne zdjęcia (portret + cała sylwetka)

- wiek

- link do showreelu / nagrania, jeśli masz (nieobowiązkowe)

- dwa zdania o sobie i dostępności w sierpniu

Na zgłoszenia czekam do 24 lipca. Odpiszę do wybranych osób i zaproszę na próbne spotkanie. Z góry dzięki — i śmiało podawajcie dalej!

ASPENDREAM PRODUCTIONS CT Actors

  Casting For Better & For Worse — Comedy Weddings & Murder Mystery Shows

 Immersive, Scripted Productions

 Non-Union

 Paid Positions

 Meals Included

 Connecticut

AspenDream Productions is currently seeking actors, singers, dancers, and theatrical production personnel throughout Connecticut for our year-round schedule of immersive comedy weddings and murder mystery productions.

AspenDream Productions has been producing its collection of nine interactive shows for more than 25 years, performing for sold-out audiences throughout Connecticut.

Our productions combine scripted theater, improvisation, audience interaction, comedy, weddings, and murder mysteries to create a completely immersive theatrical experience.

Written by: Janice Luise — Dramatists Guild

Directed by: Janice Luise — Stage Directors and Choreographers Society

Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male early to late 30s but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. 

For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!

sharedPost.text:
Stage West Playhouse™ Announces Auditions for The Addams Family!

They're creepy, they're kooky, mysterious and spooky... and they're coming to Stage West Playhouse!

Director Brady Lay,  Music Director Osario Duraes, and Choreographer Lori Kohan are excited to announce auditions for our 2026 production of The Addams Family! This is the full ADULT cast version, there are limited roles for children. 

Audition Dates
Saturday, July 18, 2026 – 6:00 PM
Sunday, July 19, 2026 – 5:00 PM

Performance Dates
October 16–25, 2026

What to Expect
Auditioners should be prepared to:

Sing a 1–2 minute selection in the style of the show (a blue tooth speaker will be available).

Participate in cold reads from the script.

Learn and perform a short dance combination.
Dance Attire

Please wear clothing you can comfortably move in and closed-toe shoes.

No Crocs, sandals, flip-flops, or other open-toed footwear will be permitted during choreography.

Please bring a bottle of water, we always want you hydrated!

Video Auditions
Can't attend in person?

Video submissions will be accepted through 5:00 PM on Sunday, July 19, 2026.

Please email all video auditions to yamusicfl@gmail.com no later than the deadline.

Questions for Director Brady Lay may be directed to: yamusicfl@gmail.com.

About the Show
A comical feast that embraces the wackiness in every family, The Addams Family is a delightfully macabre musical comedy based on the beloved characters created by Charles Addams. When Wednesday Addams falls in love with a "normal" young man and invites his family to dinner, secrets, surprises, and hilarious chaos ensue in this heartfelt story about love, family, and growing up.

Principal Roles
Gomez Addams (Baritone/Tenor – Bb2–G4)
The passionate patriarch of the Addams family. Charismatic, romantic, funny, and devoted to Morticia while struggling to keep Wednesday's secret.

Morticia Addams (Alto/Mezzo – G3–Bb5)
Elegant, mysterious, and the calm center of the Addams household. Dry wit, strong presence, and deeply in love with Gomez.

Wednesday Addams (Mezzo/Soprano with strong belt – A3–E5) actor age: 17-25
Independent, intelligent, and fiercely loyal. The ultimate princess of darkness who unexpectedly falls in love.

Uncle Fester (Tenor/Character Tenor – C3–G4)
The lovable narrator of the story. Quirky, optimistic, and searching for his own true love... the Moon.

Pugsley Addams (Child/Young Teen Voice – A3–F5)
Wednesday's mischievous younger brother who fears his sister is growing up and leaving him behind.

Grandma (Character Alto/Mezzo – G3–G5)
The feisty, outrageous grandmother with a flair for potions, mischief, and saying exactly what's on her mind.

Lurch (Bass – Eb2–E4)
The towering family butler. Mostly silent... until he isn't. A memorable comedic role.

Mal Beineke (Baritone – C3–F4)
Lucas's practical, conservative father who prefers order over chaos.

Alice Beineke (Mezzo/Soprano – Ab3–G#5)
Lucas's sweet, tightly wound mother who discovers a whole new side of herself during dinner with the Addamses.

Lucas Beineke (Tenor – C3–C5)
A sincere, "normal" young man deeply in love with Wednesday.

Ensemble
The Ancestors are featured throughout the show as spirits of the Addams family from every era of history. This energetic ensemble sings, dances, and helps tell the story while portraying a wide variety of unforgettable characters.

Whether you're a longtime Stage West performer or auditioning for the very first time, we'd love to see you. Come join us for one of Broadway's funniest and most beloved musicals!

Hi everyone! My name's Daniel, I'm 21 years old and based in the North East of England.

I'm currently at the beginning of my acting journey and actively looking for opportunities in film, TV, commercials, student productions and supporting artist work.

I have a full UK driving licence, I'm happy to travel for the right projects, and I'm always keen to learn and gain experience on set.

Professional headshots are booked for August, but in the meantime I'm happy to send recent photos and my acting CV if anyone is casting.

If anyone has any upcoming projects or knows of any opportunities, I'd love to hear from you.

Thanks for reading!

items.text:
DARSTELLERIN GESUCHT – Werbefilm-Dreh in Kempten (Allgäu)

Für einen modernen Werbefilm suchen wir eine sympathische, selbstbewusste Darstellerin, die Lust hat, vor der Kamera locker und natürlich zu performen in der Rolle einer "Influenzerin".

Darstellerin ca. 25-37 Jahre alt

Drehort: Kempten (Allgäu)

Drehtag: 19.08.

Drehzeit: ca. 9:00–16:00 Uhr

Gage: 500 €

Anreisekosten nach Absprache

Ideal wäre jemand aus der Region oder nicht allzu weit entfernt.

Worum geht’s im Film?

Es geht um ein Unternehmen, das digitale Ökosysteme für andere Unternehmen entwickelt – also Lösungen, bei denen Strategie, Marke, Technologie, Prozesse und Marketing sinnvoll zusammenspielen. Der Film wird modern, dynamisch und leicht humorvoll umgesetzt – keine steife Imagefilm-Nummer, sondern eher locker, direkt und mit kleinen visuellen Eyecatchern.

Gesucht wird eine Darstellerin, die vor der Kamera sicher wirkt, sympathisch rüberkommt und auch leichte, humorvolle Szenen natürlich spielen kann.

Bei Interesse bitte DM mit aktuellen Fotos und Referenzen/Showreel/Video in dem du in die Kamera sprichst per Nachricht melden.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen oder Empfehlungen!

🗓️ Dienstag, 21.07.2026 – 7:15 Uhr

💬 Plaudermeeting: Wert und Wirkung – der Nutzen meiner Kunst

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Harald Reiweger über erlebisorientierte Kunst. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 172. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 21.07.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Wert und Wirkung – der Nutzen meiner Kunst 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Welche Wirkung hat meine künstlerische Arbeit auf Publikum, Gesellschaft oder Auftraggeber*innen? Wie lässt sich ihr Wert vermitteln – auch jenseits des Monetären? Und wie kann ich den Nutzen meiner Kunst so kommunizieren, dass er für andere greifbar und nachvollziehbar wird? 

In diesem interaktiven Plaudermeeting tauschen wir Erfahrungen, Perspektiven und praktische Ansätze aus. Gemeinsam erarbeiten wir, wie wir unsere künstlerische Arbeit selbstbewusst nach außen vertreten, unsere Außenwirkung gezielt gestalten und mit einem klaren Verständnis des eigenen Wertes in Gespräche, Projekte und Verhandlungen gehen können. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die ihre künstlerische Position schärfen, sich inspirieren lassen und sich mit Kolleg*innen vernetzen möchten. 

© Alexandr Ivanov 

📲 Mehr Infos: 
Website: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at  
Facebook: https://fb.me/e/9GwVTnc5y 
 

#Kultur #Kunst #Künstlerinnen #Kreativität #Kunstschaffen #BusinessFrühstück #Selbstmarketing #Kulturmanagement #Netzwerken #Wien #Innovation

items.text:
Student Short Film in NYC

Looking for a Black or Hispanic Actor age 21 - 30 years old.

LOCATION: NYC, Brooklyn, Prospect Park. 

COMPENSATION: Non-pay, Food, Credit and Copy

CONTACT: [Joeymartinezflores@gmail.com](mailto:Joeymartinezflores@gmail.com) & @joeys_betterusername (Instagram)

Submission deadline is June 30th.

Hello! My name is Joey. I am a student filmmaker based in NYC. I am looking for an actor to be in my short film on July 1st. It is a one day shoot and 3 pages long. The role is a young security guard doing a shameful job to get by, has his humanity peeks through his shell after a puppet desperately wants to use the bathroom he’s guarding that is meant for humans only. Since filming is soon, we aren’t planning on holding auditions. If you can show up and pass our background check then we’d love to work with you. Thank you!

items.text:
CASTING - Student Short Film - F.I.R.S.T Institute 

 Looking for 2 actors  

-   A young adult male, aged 18 to 25, to play Alex, the main character, who is bored with his monotonous life and decides to participate in an experimental hypnosis treatment.  

- A male or female actor 24 or older to play a nurse.  

LOCATION: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania   

TIME(s): Production days July 8th to 14th.  

CONTACT: Email me at [elibuchanan777@outlook.com](mailto:elibuchanan777@outlook.com) or call/text me at 724-321-7445  

This is a free student film. I will pay for transportation and a meal.

items.text:
🚨 EXTRAS NEEDED TOMORROW 🚨

A feature film is seeking extras for filming **TOMORROW, June 24** in the Tampa Bay area.

**Age:** 18–30 preferred (if you're older but can pass for college-aged, we'd still love to have you!)

**Scene:** College party

**Wardrobe:** Casual attire (no logos, bright colors, or revealing clothing)

**Location: **Tampa, FL

**Time:** 8:30 PM – 3:00 AM

**Compensation:** IMDb credit + meal provided

We understand this is an unpaid opportunity and that the late hours may not work for everyone. If you need to leave early, we would still be happy to have you join us for part of the evening.

Interested? Email **[tobey.s.munari@gmail.com](mailto:tobey.s.munari@gmail.com)** for more details.

We hope to see you there!

items.text:
Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję juz tylko mężczyzny do roli:

Sklepikarz (35-50) – właściciel sklepu monopolowego. Arogancki, impulsywny, wulgarny.
2 sceny
Data: 22.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**20-21-22-25 lipca**

**Stawki: 140 – 280 zł gotówką po planie**

** **

Doszukuję Statystów na dni powyżej.

Jesteśmy w temacie futbolu. I daleko od fair play :)

Na świeżo emocje z Mundialu możemy zabrać na stadion w Ząbkach :D

Zapewniamy transport z Warszawy.

 

Kogo szukam?

 

**- KIBICE –** tzw. pikniki czyli wszyscy od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 60 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**

**- ULTRASI – **kobiety i mężczyźni od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 50 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**. Spośród tej grupy reżyser będzie wybierał młodych mężczyzn do kontynuacji i do epizodów. **Stawka dla osób z kontynuacją 180 zł. Dla epizodów 250 zł.**

**- GNIAZDOWY / BĘBNIARZE –** z prawdziwego zdarzenia. Tu trzeba wiedzieć co robić. **Stawka 280 zł gotówką.**

** **

Do przydzielenia będą również role POLICJANTÓW Z PREWENCJI i PORZĄDKOWYCH.  **Stawka 140 zł gotówką.**

 

Zgłaszać można się na 1 dzień lub wszystkie 4 dni.

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS + wybrany dzień / dni**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **aktualne** **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie najlepiej) i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'DODI TYTUŁEM agencja agenajacastingowg ja astingow CASTING CASTING/STATYŚCI STATYŚCI SZUKAMY STATYSTÓW SERIAL FABULARNY KOGO SZUKAMY ? Kobiety mężczyźni 16-60 lat ZGŁOSZENIA NA MAIL: ewelina.wika@podtytutem.pl DUŻO POSTACI DO OBSADZENIA Kibice, mieszkańcy, policjanci wiele innych w ZAŁĄCZENIU PROSIMY 0: •imię nazwisko numer telefonu •miejscowość wzrost zdjęcie twarzy sylwetki SZCZEGÓŁY DOTYCZĄCE ZGŁOSZENIA w TREŚCI POSTA'

**- KIBICE –** tzw. pikniki czyli wszyscy od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 60 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**

**- ULTRASI – **kobiety i mężczyźni od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 50 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**. Spośród tej grupy reżyser będzie wybierał młodych mężczyzn do kontynuacji i do epizodów. **Stawka dla osób z kontynuacją 180 zł. Dla epizodów 250 zł.**

**- GNIAZDOWY / BĘBNIARZE –** z prawdziwego zdarzenia. Tu trzeba wiedzieć co robić. **Stawka 280 zł gotówką.**

** **

Do przydzielenia będą również role POLICJANTÓW Z PREWENCJI i PORZĄDKOWYCH.  **Stawka 140 zł gotówką.**

 

Zgłaszać można się na 1 dzień lub wszystkie 4 dni.

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS + wybrany dzień / dni**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **aktualne** **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie najlepiej) i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka.

items.text:
🎬 **PAID CASTING CALL – DYSPRAXIA SHORT FILM**

Currently casting four roles for **DYSPRAXIA**, a powerful short drama filming in **Wolverhampton on 9th and 10th October 2026**.

The film follows Elliot, a 14-year-old student struggling with the hidden challenges of dyspraxia. Through his experiences at home and school, the story explores how everyday tasks can become overwhelming when the people around him mistake his difficulties for laziness or a lack of effort.

**Roles:**

**ELLIOT – Playing age 13–15**
A quiet, intelligent student who feels frustrated and misunderstood. This is a sensitive lead role requiring strong naturalistic acting and the ability to communicate emotion through expressions and body language.

**SANDRA – Playing age 40s**
Elliot’s hardworking mother. She loves her son but struggles to understand the full impact of his dyspraxia. Requires a performer who can balance firmness, frustration and warmth.

**MRS HARMON – Playing age 30s–50s**
A calm and empathetic SEN coordinator who helps Elliot’s mother understand that his struggles go far beyond physical coordination.

**MR HUGHES – Playing age 30s–40s**
Elliot’s well-meaning classroom teacher, whose attempts to keep the lesson moving unintentionally leave Elliot feeling exposed and left behind.

All roles are **paid**. Applicants should be available for both filming dates.

To apply, please email me here: williamsonowen2023@gmail.com

Thanks!

items.text:
Why theatre is so important:

A study in The British Journal of Psychiatry found that people over 50 who attend arts events once a month reduce their risk of depression by 48%. 48%!!!!

https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/the-british-journal-of-psychiatry/article/cultural-engagement-and-incident-depression-in-older-adults-evidence-from-the-english-longitudinal-study-of-ageing/F25368CA79340C430B046A1DDDDC05B6?promo=27690

Research from the NEA shows that arts participation is associated with lower rates of loneliness, increased civic engagement, and greater life satisfaction.

And theatre specifically has been shown to enhance empathy and emotional intelligence—critical traits for strong relationships and thriving communities.

https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S002210312100038X?promo=27690

#theater #healing #psychiatry

items.text:
Casting Call: Actors, Interactive Performers & Scare Technicians

Gallows Hill Museum & Theatre – Salem, Massachusetts / The Lost Museum Haunted Adventure

Paid Seasonal Positions
Fall Halloween Season

Gallows Hill Museum & Theatre, one of Salem’s premier Halloween attractions, is seeking talented, energetic, and dependable performers to join our cast for the upcoming fall season. We are casting for multiple short productions that blend theatrical storytelling, audience interaction, suspense, and practical effects.

Production 1: Main Stage Immersive Experience

We’re seeking versatile actors to perform in our signature immersive theatrical production about witches and ghosts.

This fast-paced 22 minute show features a single performer portraying multiple characters through rapid costume changes, dynamic storytelling, comedy, suspense, and the use of puppetry. Performers must be comfortable switching between distinct personalities while maintaining high energy throughout each performance.

Ideal candidates possess:

Strong acting and storytelling abilities
Excellent character work
Confidence performing for live audiences
Quick memorization skills
High energy
Some experience with improvisation

This role offers an exciting opportunity to showcase versatility in a truly unique theatrical experience.

Production 2: The Lost Museum

Step into the role of an eccentric museum guide as guests explore a collection of mysterious artifacts and strange curiosities…

…until everything begins to go spectacularly wrong.

Actors portraying museum guides lead guests through haunted rooms while balancing suspense, audience interaction, and improvisation. You’ll remain in character as supernatural events unfold around your tour group, creating an experience that is equal parts entertaining, immersive, and delightfully chaotic. 

When not leading tours, performers will also work as Scare Technicians, operating puppets, ghosts, practical effects, lighting cues, hidden scares, and other theatrical illusions that make the attraction come alive.

We’re seeking performers who are:

Passionate about theatre, Halloween, and immersive entertainment
Strong communicators comfortable speaking to groups
Excellent improvisers who can think on their feet
Reliable, punctual, and professional
Team players with positive attitudes
Comfortable interacting with audiences of all ages
Interested in learning backstage theatrical effects and puppet operation
Day, evening and weekend shifts are available.

Previous experience in theatre, haunted attractions, improv, museums, escape rooms, theme parks, or live entertainment is welcomed but not required. We are happy to train enthusiastic individuals with a strong work ethic and a willingness to learn.

Please submit:

Headshot (professional or recent clear photo)
Resume (if available)
A brief introduction telling us about yourself and why you’d like to join our cast
Demo reel (optional)
Video submission is also acceptable

 Email: gallowshillsalem@outlook.com for an audition appointment.

American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

  sullivansean3535@gmail.com

Come help us bring Radio Theater to life this Christmas!

items.summary:
American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

  sullivansean3535@gmail.com

Come help us bring Radio Theater to life this Christmas!

items.text:
THE STAGE IS CALLING. Season Auditions are OPEN!

Orlando Family Stage is searching for the next incredible artists to join our 2026–2027 Centennial Season!

From world premieres to beloved favorites, this season brings stories to life for thousands of young audiences and families across Central Florida and we want YOU to be part of the magic. 

We are currently accepting video auditions for our upcoming season, featuring:

🎃 The Best Halloween Ever — World Premiere
🎄 A Charlie Brown Christmas Live on Stage!
🐱 Pete The Cat’s Big Hollywood Adventure
✨ A New Spring Musical — World Premiere (title coming soon!)
🐉 Dragons Love Tacos 2: The MuSequel

All roles are paid, and performers ages 11+ are encouraged to audition. Orlando Family Stage is committed to inclusive casting and welcomes performers of all backgrounds and experiences.

Ready to bring your talent, creativity, and imagination to the stage? Audition details, submission guidelines, and everything you need to know are waiting for you at the link in our bio. 🎭

📅 Video submissions are due July 26, 2026.

Know an actor who belongs on this stage? Tag them below and help spread the word! ⬇️

https://orlandofamilystage.com/get-involved/auditions/

#OrlandoAuditions #ActorAuditions #OrlandoTheatre

items.text:
# PAID CASTING - HUMAN PINBALL SCENE-DEVELOPMENT LAB

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Compensation:** $25 CAD per hour (minimum three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop)
**Union Status:** Nonunion

Casting Vancouver-based performers for an initial paid scene-development lab for **Human Pinball**, an original one-hour dark-comedy television series.

The series follows Ren, a trans man revisiting a chaotic period of his life involving dating, identity, police encounters, addiction and sobriety, failed ambition, and the enormous gap between how events felt at the time and how he understands them now.

This is **not** currently a full stage production or a theatrical adaptation of the complete pilot. Initial paid rehearsals will explore selected scenes from the series, with an emphasis on discovering character chemistry, comic rhythm, emotional truth, and which performers make the material impossible to ignore.

The work may incorporate minimal staging, voiceover, projected material, and fast transitions between past and present.

Strong performers and combinations may be invited into future paid workshops or public performances, but no larger production, ongoing company role, or filmed proof of concept is currently guaranteed.

## Roles
PAST REN - Lead

**Playing age:** Late 20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Trans man
**Ethnicity:** Open

Ren before medical and social transition. He is impulsive, sincere, defensive, resourceful, romantically overconfident, emotionally chaotic, and unintentionally funny.

Past Ren must be played as the same boy and man we meet later in the timeline - not as a lesbian, a woman performing masculinity, or someone consciously trying to appear masculine. He is already completely Ren internally, even though the people around him perceive him differently.

The role requires grounded comic instincts, emotional vulnerability, romantic confidence, and the ability to make Ren's wildly optimistic interpretations feel completely sincere.

Performers of all gender identities are welcome to submit if they are comfortable portraying the character on these terms.

JUNE - Supporting

**Playing age:** Mid-20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Woman
**Ethnicity:** Open

Confident, socially fluid, attractive without performing for attention, and difficult for Ren to read accurately.

The role requires understated comic timing, natural presence, and the ability to create believable romantic and sexual tension through genuine connection rather than heightened performance.

ELISE - Supporting

**Playing age:** Mid-20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Woman
**Ethnicity:** Open

Direct, charismatic, emotionally intelligent, and comfortable challenging Ren's assumptions.

Requires grounded flirtation, strong chemistry, quick comic instincts, and ease with emotionally charged dialogue.

## Compensation & Schedule

**Rate:** $25 CAD per hour

**Minimum:** Three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop

**Location:** Vancouver, BC

**Initial Schedule:** Approximately 2–4 paid sessions during July and August 2026, scheduled around cast availability.

Any future rehearsals, workshops, staged presentations, public performances, or additional work will be offered and compensated separately. Continued involvement is not guaranteed.

No travel or accommodation is provided. Applicants must be based in Metro Vancouver or able to work locally.

## Content

No nudity or simulated sex.

The material includes mature language and references to dating, sexuality, alcohol, drug use, addiction, police restraint and arrest, gender dysphoria, death, financial distress, and emotionally vulnerable autobiographical experiences.

Specific scene content and physical requirements will be disclosed before rehearsals or auditions. Performer boundaries and consent will be respected throughout the process.

## How to Submit

Please reply directly to this post or email info@crowdcue.ca

Include:
* Your name
* The role you'd like to be considered for
* Your location
* Acting résumé or brief experience summary
* Headshot or recent photo
* A link to an existing reel, self-tape, scene, or other performance footage
* Your general availability during July and August 2026

A custom audition tape is **not** required for the initial submission. Shortlisted performers will receive a brief audition scene and character context for the next stage.

Please use the subject line:

**HUMAN PINBALL CASTING - [ROLE]**

items.text:
CALLING ALL YOUNG ACTORS, PARENTS, AGENTS & INDUSTRY FAMILIES!
THIS SUMMER... DON'T JUST TRAIN. LEAVE WITH THREE PROFESSIONAL SHOWREEL SCENES.
Perfect for young actors with or without representation, Spotlight members, drama students and anyone looking to break into the professional Film & TV industry.
Meladrama is proud to present three Screen Acting & Showreel Summer Schools, designed specifically for ambitious young actors who are serious about Film & TV.
WIGAN SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£140 if booked today | £160 in instalments
Tuesday 28th – Friday 31st July at Worsley Hall Community Centre, Wigan, WN5 9QE

PRESTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 3rd – Friday 7th August at Lostock Hall Conservative Club, Brownedge Lane, Preston, PR5 5AA

WARRINGTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 10th – Friday 14th August at St Wilfrid's Church Hall, Grappenhall, Warrington, WA4 3EP

Throughout the week, every actor will receive intensive professional coaching before filming THREE industry-standard showreel scenes in Native Accent, Received Pronunciation (RP) & General American. Every scene is professionally directed and filmed, giving actors fresh, high-quality footage to strengthen their Spotlight profile, impress agents and demonstrate their versatility to casting directors.
Unlike many showreel courses, our scenes are taken from real Film & TV scripts, carefully selected to suit each actor's age, casting type and ability.
Even better, every scene is performed opposite professional actors. Students will work directly with Melanie Ash and Leo Ashton, ensuring every performance is believable, natural and of the highest possible standard—no awkward scene partners, no uneven performances, just professional-quality footage you'll be proud to send to agents and casting directors.
Throughout the week students will receive specialist coaching in:
Screen Acting for Camera, Character Development, Audition Technique, Received Pronunciation (RP), General American Accent, Working with the Camera, Performance Direction, Industry Knowledge & Advice
Training is led by Melanie Ash—professional actor, director and acting coach, founder of Meladrama Acting Schooland CHAOS Actors Management. Melanie trained at the Manchester School of Acting and Manchester Metropolitan University, and her professional acting credits include Coronation Street, Emmerdale, Casualty, The Bay, Doctors, Ackley Bridge, Red Rose, Peterloo and numerous national television commercials. With over 30 years' professional experience, she has coached hundreds of young performers into successful careers in Film & TV, with students regularly securing roles for Netflix, BBC, ITV, Channel 4, Sky, HBO, Amazon Prime, and major feature films and TV Commercials. 
Students will also benefit from the experience of Leo Ashton, who began his professional acting career at just six years old. His credits include House of the Dragon, The Bay, Red Rose, Deep Water, Peterloo and more. As a young actor actively working within the industry, Leo offers invaluable first-hand insight into the realities and expectations of professional Film & TV acting.
Whether your child already has an agent, is building a Spotlight profile or is looking to break into the industry, this is an incredible opportunity to receive specialist training and leave with professional showreel material that can genuinely enhance future casting opportunities.
TRAIN. PERFORM. FILM. LEAVE INDUSTRY READY.
Can't attend every day?
No problem! We understand that many young actors have auditions, filming commitments and family holidays during the summer. Get in touch and we'll do our very best to create a bespoke package wherever possible, so your child doesn't miss out.
A quick note regarding representation...
This summer school is not an audition for CHAOS Actors Management, and attendance does not guarantee representation.
Melanie has built fantastic relationships with many of the UK's leading children's and young performers' agents over the past 30 years and fully respects existing agency representation. This course is designed purely to help every young actor develop their skills, confidence and professional showreel material—whether they're already represented or just starting their acting journey.
Places are strictly limited to ensure every actor receives plenty of individual coaching, rehearsal time and filming opportunities.
BOOK YOUR PLACE TODAY
https://forms.gle/8hq68hNBXqMCRBZn6

items.summary:
CALLING ALL YOUNG ACTORS, PARENTS, AGENTS & INDUSTRY FAMILIES!
THIS SUMMER... DON'T JUST TRAIN. LEAVE WITH THREE PROFESSIONAL SHOWREEL SCENES.
Perfect for young actors with or without representation, Spotlight members, drama students and anyone looking to break into the professional Film & TV industry.
Meladrama is proud to present three Screen Acting & Showreel Summer Schools, designed specifically for ambitious young actors who are serious about Film & TV.
WIGAN SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£140 if booked today | £160 in instalments
Tuesday 28th – Friday 31st July at Worsley Hall Community Centre, Wigan, WN5 9QE

PRESTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 3rd – Friday 7th August at Lostock Hall Conservative Club, Brownedge Lane, Preston, PR5 5AA

WARRINGTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 10th – Friday 14th August at St Wilfrid's Church Hall, Grappenhall, Warrington, WA4 3EP

Throughout the week, every actor will receive intensive professional coaching before filming THREE industry-standard showreel scenes in Native Accent, Received Pronunciation (RP) & General American. Every scene is professionally directed and filmed, giving actors fresh, high-quality footage to strengthen their Spotlight profile, impress agents and demonstrate their versatility to casting directors.
Unlike many showreel courses, our scenes are taken from real Film & TV scripts, carefully selected to suit each actor's age, casting type and ability.
Even better, every scene is performed opposite professional actors. Students will work directly with Melanie Ash and Leo Ashton, ensuring every performance is believable, natural and of the highest possible standard—no awkward scene partners, no uneven performances, just professional-quality footage you'll be proud to send to agents and casting directors.
Throughout the week students will receive specialist coaching in:
Screen Acting for Camera, Character Development, Audition Technique, Received Pronunciation (RP), General American Accent, Working with the Camera, Performance Direction, Industry Knowledge & Advice
Training is led by Melanie Ash—professional actor, director and acting coach, founder of Meladrama Acting Schooland CHAOS Actors Management. Melanie trained at the Manchester School of Acting and Manchester Metropolitan University, and her professional acting credits include Coronation Street, Emmerdale, Casualty, The Bay, Doctors, Ackley Bridge, Red Rose, Peterloo and numerous national television commercials. With over 30 years' professional experience, she has coached hundreds of young performers into successful careers in Film & TV, with students regularly securing roles for Netflix, BBC, ITV, Channel 4, Sky, HBO, Amazon Prime, and major feature films and TV Commercials. 
Students will also benefit from the experience of Leo Ashton, who began his professional acting career at just six years old. His credits include House of the Dragon, The Bay, Red Rose, Deep Water, Peterloo and more. As a young actor actively working within the industry, Leo offers invaluable first-hand insight into the realities and expectations of professional Film & TV acting.
Whether your child already has an agent, is building a Spotlight profile or is looking to break into the industry, this is an incredible opportunity to receive specialist training and leave with professional showreel material that can genuinely enhance future casting opportunities.
TRAIN. PERFORM. FILM. LEAVE INDUSTRY READY.
Can't attend every day?
No problem! We understand that many young actors have auditions, filming commitments and family holidays during the summer. Get in touch and we'll do our very best to create a bespoke package wherever possible, so your child doesn't miss out.
A quick note regarding representation...
This summer school is not an audition for CHAOS Actors Management, and attendance does not guarantee representation.
Melanie has built fantastic relationships with many of the UK's leading children's and young performers' agents over the past 30 years and fully respects existing agency representation. This course is designed purely to help every young actor develop their skills, confidence and professional showreel material—whether they're already represented or just starting their acting journey.
Places are strictly limited to ensure every actor receives plenty of individual coaching, rehearsal time and filming opportunities.
BOOK YOUR PLACE TODAY
https://forms.gle/8hq68hNBXqMCRBZn6

sharedPost.text:
Aspiring/Beginner Actors: Are you looking for some screen acting guidance and mentorship?🎬🌟

Hi, I’m Emma! I’m an Actress and Screen Acting Mentor based in the UK.

I’ve been involved in many productions for companies such as the BBC, Channel 4, Manchester Film School, SAE Liverpool and more.

The aim of the sessions is to give guidance on beginner screen actors who want tips on screen acting techniques and feedback on auditions, self tapes or monologues! My sessions are casual and informal, and are completely tailored to the individual and their level. I am DBS Checked.

All my lessons are online!

Before booking a session, I offer a FREE 10 min consultation, either by video call or phone. This is an opportunity for us to meet and discuss what you would want out of a session, and how I can best help you.

If you decide after the consultation you would like to book an online session, this can be arranged at a time that suits you!

Please message me if you’re interested in booking a free consultation, or simply want to know more about how I can help you☺️

Instagram: @taketwoacting

Thank you!

Could you be our Rumi? 💜⚔️

Casting call for Princess Parties London 🩷✨ an award winning children's entertainment company based in and serving Greater London. 

I am looking for an actress of East Asian heritage to play our demon hunter! 

This is a well paid, freelance role working alongside a wonderful team.

Please see image for further details, and email submissions to info@princesspartieslondon.co.uk

Looking forward to hearing from you! 

Rebecca x

items.text: New cow girl parties

sharedPost.text:
🤠✨ YEEHAW! A BRAND NEW ADVENTURE HAS ARRIVED! ✨🤠

Saddle up, partners… our NEW Cowgirl Party is here! 🌵🐴

Get ready for a rootin’ tootin’ celebration packed with laughter, games, music and unforgettable magical moments. Your little cowboys and cowgirls will love meeting our energetic cowgirl as she leads them through an exciting Wild West adventure!

⭐ What’s included?
🤠 Interactive games
🎵 Music & dancing
🏇 Cowgirl challenges
📖 Storytime
🎉 Prizes & surprises
✨ And lots more!

Perfect for birthdays, school events, nurseries, family fun days and celebrations of all kinds.

If your little one dreams of boots, hats and Wild West adventures, this is the party for them!

📅 Now taking bookings across the North West.

💌 Message us today to check availability and secure your date before they’re all rounded up!

#RegallyRoyalParties #CowgirlParty #WildWestParty #BirthdayPartyIdeas #KidsEntertainment NorthWestParties PartyWithJessie YeeHaw MagicalMemories ChildrensParties

NOW CASTING: STRAIGHT SINGLE MEN IN LOS ANGELES

Purse First Studios is casting confident, charismatic straight single men for an upcoming YouTube dating show.

We're looking for men who are:

Ages 30–40
Straight and single
Comfortable on camera
Available for a virtual screening interview ASAP
Available to film Tuesday, July 21 from 1:00–4:00 PM in Burbank, CA

If you think you'd be a great fit, email socials@bobthedragqueen.com with:

Your name
Age
A few recent photos
Your Instagram (if you have one)
A few sentences about yourself

Know someone perfect? Send this their way!

Spørgsmålet er: Ville du dele et stykke, eller spiser du hele skålen selv? Ingen fordømmelse her! 

Fuld opskrift i kommentarerne!

If you are interested please email or dm me your headshots and a reel if you have one:

arjungillfilm@gmail.com
