items.text:
Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this.

🎬 URGENT LOS ANGELES CASTING CALL – FRIEND GROUPS OF 3 TEENS (AGES 13–16)
We're casting real friend groups of three for a Claire's Ear Piercing Campaign!
✨ Pay: $600 per person for the visual shoot.
✨ If your group is selected for the social media/email campaign, each person will receive an additional $2,500. (Selection for the social/email campaign is not guaranteed.)
Who We're Looking For:
Real friend groups (ages 13–16)
Girls, boys, co-ed, and LGBTQ+ groups are all encouraged to submit
Outgoing, playful personalities with genuine chemistry
Comfortable being yourselves on camera
Excited to celebrate a milestone together with a shared piercing experience
You may already have your ears pierced and can receive an additional piercing if selected. One friend—or all three—may choose matching earrings.
We're looking for friends celebrating life's big moments, such as:
Birthdays
Graduations
Finishing middle school and starting high school
Personal achievements
Any exciting new chapter worth celebrating
We want your friendship to feel authentic, spontaneous, and full of fun, confidence, and excitement.
Bonus!
If your friend group loves documenting life with a camcorder, disposable camera, or Polaroid, we'd love to see that in your self-tape!
In Your Self-Tape, Please Answer:
1. What's the funniest thing that's ever happened when you were all together?
2. Who's the "bad influence" (in the best way)?
3. Who would be the first one in the piercing chair?
4. What is everyone doing after this next chapter?
5. If your friend group had a group chat name, what would it be?

📧 Submit your self-tape by Tuesday, July 21, 2026, at 12:00 PM (Noon)
Email: Jacqui@pitmancastingprojects.com

Everyone In LA

items.text:
Erlebt Teil 1 von 16 nun bereits auch hier: https://youtu.be/gLiVyjVHt6c?si=CR4IPL4naQcLNJHb 

Maylas Herzgeschichten - Teil 1 von 16 „Liebe mit einer unverwechselbaren Entstehungsgeschichte"

Wie beginnt eine Liebe, die über 15 Jahre lang zwei Menschen, unzählige Erinnerungen und später auch eine kleine Hündin miteinander verbindet?

In Teil eins von „Maylas Herzgeschichten“ erzählt Mayla aus ihrer ganz eigenen Perspektive von ihrer Menschenmama und ihrem Menschenpapa. Von einer außergewöhnlichen Entstehungsgeschichte, einem Mann, einem Brot, einem Taschenladen und der Schlagerscheune. Von Reisen, vertrauten Geräuschen, einem besonderen Helene-Fischer-Becher und den vielen kleinen Momenten, aus denen über Jahre ein gemeinsames Zuhause entstand.

Mayla war bei den ersten Kapiteln noch nicht geboren. Doch sie hat aufmerksam zugehört und verstanden, dass eine Geschichte nicht unwahr wird, nur weil sie später eine andere Richtung nimmt.

Manchmal muss man sich daran erinnern, weshalb eine gemeinsame Geschichte einmal so wertvoll war, bevor man verstehen kann, weshalb ihre Veränderung so schmerzt.

Hört Euch jetzt Teil eins an und schreibt in die Kommentare: Welcher kleine Alltagsmoment bedeutet für Euch echtes Zuhause?

Idee und Text von Christian Weiße

#MaylasHerzgeschichten #LiebeImAlltag #Hundegeschichten #MenschenUndHunde #GemeinsameErinnerungen

items.text:
🎭** vs. **🎥** Vergiss verstaubte Bühnenreife. Lerne echte Kamerareife!**

 

In genau 16 Tagen (am 04. August) startet die exklusive Jahresklasse der Schauspielwerkstatt Berlin. Und die harte Wahrheit ist: Die Kamera sucht kein großes Theater-Overacting. Sie sucht die ungeschminkte, psychologische Wahrheit im Close-Up.

 

Während andere noch lernen, wie man die Stimme in die letzte Reihe eines Theatersaals projiziert, trainieren wir dich von Tag eins an genau dort, wo die Jobs vergeben werden: Vor der Linse.

 

**Warum diese Ausbildung dein Karriere-Katalysator sein kann:**
* 🎥 **100 % Fokus auf Film, TV & Werbung:** Kein veraltetes Theater-Training.
* 💻 **Maximale Flexibilität:** Ortsunabhängig & berufsbegleitend via Zoom (perfekt für Quereinsteiger).
* 🎬 **Echte Praxis:** Inklusive intensiver Präsenz-Drehtage für dein Demoband/Showreel.
* 💼 **Sicherheit:** GVL-gefördert, branchenanerkannt und maßgeschneidert für moderne eCastings (Absolventen der SWB haben bereits für Tatort, Netflix & Co. gedreht!)

⚠️ **ACHTUNG – STRENG LIMITIERT:** Um die intensive 1:1-Betreuung zu garantieren, ist die Klasse auf **maximal 10 Teilnehmer** begrenzt. Die ersten Plätze sind bereits vergeben. Wir vergeben die allerletzten freien Plätze in den nächsten Tagen ausschließlich über ein persönliches Auswahlgespräch.

 

**Dein Weg in den Kurs (Start: 04. August 2026):** Klicke auf den Link in unserer Bio oder schreibe uns jetzt eine kurze Nachricht mit dem Wort **„KAMERA“** hier auf Instagram/Facebook.

 

Wir melden uns sofort bei dir für dein kostenloses, unverbindliches Erstgespräch via Zoom. Lass uns prüfen, ob du dieses Jahr noch dabei bist!

 

👉 **Direkt bewerben:** [https://www.schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/ausbildung](https://www.schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/ausbildung) oder PN senden!

 

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

 

Time to shine.

⚠️ **ACHTUNG – STRENG LIMITIERT:** Um die intensive 1:1-Betreuung zu garantieren, ist die Klasse auf **maximal 10 Teilnehmer** begrenzt. Die ersten Plätze sind bereits vergeben. Wir vergeben die allerletzten freien Plätze in den nächsten Tagen ausschließlich über ein persönliches Auswahlgespräch.

 

**Dein Weg in den Kurs (Start: 04. August 2026):** Klicke auf den Link in unserer Bio oder schreibe uns jetzt eine kurze Nachricht mit dem Wort **„KAMERA“** hier auf Instagram/Facebook.

 

Wir melden uns sofort bei dir für dein kostenloses, unverbindliches Erstgespräch via Zoom. Lass uns prüfen, ob du dieses Jahr noch dabei bist!

 

👉 **Direkt bewerben:** [https://www.schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/ausbildung](https://www.schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/ausbildung) oder PN senden!

 

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

 

Time to shine.

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE — PAID SUPPORTING ROLE

I’m looking for an actress to play Mrs. Wallace, Tess’s mother, in my upcoming short film The Gift. It is a small but important supporting role with a brief driveway scene and natural dialogue.

Role: Mrs. Wallace
Playing age: 40–50
Race: White
Shoot date: August 5, 2026
Shoot time: 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM
Shoot location: Denver metro area
Compensation: $100

Required availability:

Online team meeting on July 20
In-person rehearsal near Castle Rock on July 22, approximately three hours in the evening
Filming on August 5 from 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM

A brief audition tape will be required.

Previous work can be found by searching Forrainfilms on YouTube.

To be considered, please email your name, a recent photo, contact information, and any acting materials or relevant experience to sunburstcinema@gmail.com with the subject line “Mrs. Wallace Casting.”

Please send all inquiries via email. No DMs, please.

Thank you!!!

items.text:
Casting Call

"A Bad Person"

LOGLINE: A small-time con artist, already having the worst day of his life, receives a visit from his ex-wife

Production Title: A Bad Person

Genre: Drama

Production Type: Indie

Compensation: Paid. 

Audition Information: Virtual/Self Tape

Shooting Schedule:

● Rehearsal  Saturday 8/8

● Shoot Sunday 8/9 & Saturday 8/15 & Sunday 8/16

Shooting Location: Commerce City, CO

Email: andrew@westofcenterfilms.com

Character Breakdowns:

CALVIN MALE (30s-40s)

A small-time scam artist, who has expanded his efforts into a large warehouse full of employees. We meet him on possibly the worst day of his life, where, after finding out his mother has died, he receives an unexpected visit from his ex-wife, whom he very much still loves. The drama takes place between these two characters, as they try to navigate a possible reunion amidst the chaos taking place all around them. Looking for someone with high endurance (will be walking the entire shoot), intensity, and on-screen magnetism. We don’t have to like him, but we do have to care about him.

SUZIE Female (40s-60s)

A well-intentioned–but somewhat hapless–assistant to a small-time con artist, Suzie has the habit of making bad situations into worse ones. Looking for someone with high endurance (will be walking the entire shoot), funny, charming, and a pure scene-stealer.

PA / EXTRA (18+)

A hybrid role consisting of helping out production, while appearing in the background of scenes, with possible dialogue. Experience isn’t the biggest factor, mainly looking for someone with a great attitude and bundles of energy who is keen to learn. The days will be active and long, but extremely fun. 

Please send your resume to andrew@westofcenterfilms.com. Let us know if your avalable on the day of rehearsal and shooting day. Let us know if your SAG and upon request, I'll email you the attached side. Self-tape by Friday, July 17th. Early submissions is awsome.

items.title: Casting Call

items.text:
Kick Ass Film Fest is gearing up for a massive Season 7, and we want YOU on our board. We are on a mission to build the future of indie film in our state, and we need your passion to make the 2027 Spring Festival our best yet.
What you’ll be doing: Helping us run epic Fall Meet & Greets (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder), organizing Spring screening premieres, and planning the ultimate Awards Show.
Why join?
    •    Compete anyway: You can still enter the competition!  You won’t be involved in the competition portion of planning the festival.  
    •    Level up with us: This is a volunteer role, but as we grow, there will be opportunities for these to turn into official, expanded positions.
Let’s unite the Colorado film scene. Who’s ready to make some magic? 👇 Drop a 🎥 in the comments if you want to learn more!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScSY-u1zenlnh8lXRaQi3Lr9O93x5Zg4Ca06YChhft1Db2saQ/viewform

sharedPost.text:
Kickass Film Fest is growing, and we’re looking for passionate creatives, film lovers, organizers, and community builders to join our volunteer board.

This volunteer team will help support the events leading up to our 2027 Spring Festival, including:

Fall Meet & Greet networking events (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder)
Spring screening premiere events 
Spring Festival Awards Show Planning
Note: You will not be part of the competition planning, but you can still participate in the competition.

This is a volunteer board, but as KAFF continues to grow, there may be opportunities to grow into official roles or expanded positions on a case-by-case basis.

If you want to help us for Kickass Film Fest Season 7 and help us build the future of independent film in Southern Colorado, we’d love to hear from you!

Apply here: https://forms.gle/SaF2u71YJhbFNXAq9

items.text:
Poszukujemy charyzmatycznych osobowości do nowego internetowego projektu o tematyce około motoryzacyjnej. Jeśli motoryzacja to Twoje środowisko i masz wyrazisty charakter — zgłoś się. Szukamy m.in. stereotypowego kierowcy BMW, spokojnego kierowcy, taksówkarza, byłego policjanta, byłego albo czynnego kierowcy zawodowego oraz innych osób z mocnymi poglądami na kulturę jazdy. Doświadczenie telewizyjne nie jest wymagane- liczy się autentyczność, osobowość i swoboda przed kamerą.

1. Zdjęcia w Warszawie.

2. Zdjęcia planowane są pod koniec sierpnia albo we wrześniu 2026. Dokładne daty do ustalenia.

3. Wynagrodzenie: 500 zł netto za 1 dzień zdjęciowy i prawa.

W razie zainteresowania, spełnienia wymagań, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację:

1. Imię i nazwisko

2. Rok urodzenia

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefon kontaktowy

5. Adres e-mail

6. Wzrost

7. Link do profilu na Facebooku

8. Opisz kilka zdań o sobie oraz krótkie nagranie wideo (wizytówka).

9. Minimum trzy zdjęcia

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Nowy projekt motoryzacyjny

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w nowym projekcie internetowym zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

items.text:
Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję juz tylko mężczyzny do roli:

Sklepikarz (35-50) – właściciel sklepu monopolowego. Arogancki, impulsywny, wulgarny.
2 sceny
Data: 22.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze”

Sklepikarz (35-50) – właściciel sklepu monopolowego. Arogancki, impulsywny, wulgarny.
2 sceny
Data: 22.07

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich

items.title: ARE YOU READY??

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Giovanni, and I'm a fashion & portrait photographer from the Netherlands. I'll be visiting **Berlin from July 20th to July 22nd**, and I'm looking to collaborate with a **male model (18+), tall, athletic/muscular build**, for an intimate, editorial-style direct flash photoshoot.

My photography is inspired by 90s fashion campaigns, with a candid, classy, and cinematic aesthetic. This is **not** an explicit shoot, but it is sensual and fashion-oriented.

If you're interested or know someone who might be a great fit, feel free to send me a message!

📍 Berlin, Germany
📅 July 20 to July 22
📸 Instagram: **@giotimoteo**

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

topComments.text: Elisa Rüdiger ich habe dir geschrieben 😇

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE: PAID FEATURE FILM
PROJECT DETAILS

Project Title: TROM (working title) 

Casting Director: Kwaku Ankomah

Project Type: Feature Film (Filming in UK) 

Casting Location: Self-Tape / London, UK

Key Dates & Deadlines:

- Application Deadline: Sunday 19th July 2026 at 6:00 PM BST

- Self-Tape Audition Window: 18th – 21st July 2026

- Self-Tape Submission Deadline: Tuesday 21st July 2026 at 6:00 PM BST

- Live Chemistry Recalls (London): Saturday 25th or Sunday 26th July 2026 (TBC)

Production Dates: Friday 7th – Sunday 9th August 2026 (3 Shoot Days)

Location: London (including luxury penthouse & yacht locations)

Remuneration: £400.00 per day (Flat Fee). On-set catering and pre-approved travel expenses provided.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CHARACTER BREAKDOWNS (SPEAKING ROLES)

ROLE: KAREN

Playing Age: 24–26

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White British

Appearance: Polished, elegant, high-status ease.

Accent: Natural, contemporary British English (RP / upper-middle-class).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Karen is a major supporting role in the London section of the film. She is the affluent, polished, and affectionate girlfriend of the lead character, Marcus (a successful Ghanaian stockbroker). When an unexpected crisis forces Marcus to suddenly flee back to Ghana, Karen's secure world collapses.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires strong romantic chemistry and comfortable with kissing and luxury social scenes (yacht/penthouse).

- Requires excellent emotional range.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: JAMES

Playing Age: 33–36

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Well-groomed, sharp, masculine corporate ease.

Accent: Contemporary British English / Corporate London. 

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

James is part colleague, part mentor, and a firm floor favourite at the brokerage. He is a senior office figure who immediately recognizes and enjoys top-tier talent. In the opening London scenes, James’s interactions with Marcus are vital to establishing just how highly valued, admired, and celebrated Marcus is within the firm before the crisis hits. He speaks to Marcus as an equal with genuine professional respect and affection.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires natural authority, warmth, and sharp wit.

- Strong onscreen chemistry with the actor playing Marcus to establish deep professional trust.

- Performance must be socially fluid, alive, and sharp—completely avoiding any stiff, bureaucratic corporate stereotypes.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: DAVID

Playing Age: 40–45

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Distinguished, senior corporate presence. 

Accent: British English (Natural / Professional).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

David is one of the primary corporate faces spearheading the internal investigation. He is deeply procedural, controlled, and entirely unsentimental. He does not need to overplay suspicion; his immense power comes from his absolute stillness and the fact that he never wastes a word. He is a senior executive accustomed to handling high-stakes legal sensitivity and institutional protection. He is calm, direct, and dangerous precisely because he sounds so measured.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires immense screen command, presence, and stillness over flamboyance. 

- Must deliver sharp, clinical dialogue that instantly shifts the temperature and tension of the boardroom.

- Performance must feel senior, trusted, and completely at home in corporate crisis mode.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: HELEN

Playing Age: 35–40

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Elegant, sophisticated, impeccable boardroom grooming.

Accent: British English (RP / Corporate Eloquent).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Helen is the most polished face in the corporate boardroom. She leads parts of the high-stakes questioning with effortless professional calm and surface civility. However, underneath that flawless veneer is hard institutional discipline. She is highly intelligent, meticulously well-briefed, and emotionally self-contained. Her function is to embody the cool machinery of a corporate system that can smile warmly while systematically dismantling someone. 

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires a powerful, commanding boardroom presence without ever raising her voice or relying on melodrama.

- Excellent balance of outward sophistication and underlying steel.

- Must be fully believable as an elite, high-level corporate operator whose calm restraint makes the interrogation deeply unsettling.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: NOAH

Playing Age: 40–46

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Sharp, clinical, highly observant.

Accent: British English (Natural / Precise).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Noah represents the hardest edge in the boardroom. Where Helen is controlled and David is procedural, Noah is the most forensic, probing, and openly suspicious investigator. He is the one who will relentlessly press when an answer does not satisfy him. He is not a theatrical antagonist; he is highly clever, clinical, and calculating. His questions function like scalpels rather than blunt force.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires a precise, highly watchful actor who excels at managing interrogation rhythm and subtext.

- Ability to make simple, direct lines sound like absolute traps.

- Must feel entirely capable of getting under the lead character's skin while maintaining perfect professional composure.

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS

Please email applications directly to: trommovie@gmail.com

All submissions must include:

1. Current professional headshots / photos

2. An up-to-date Acting CV / Resume

3. A link to your showreel (if available)

Upon receipt and review of your photos and CV, further production information and script sides will be provided to selected applicants.

NEW ADDITION: 

ROLE: SAM

Playing Age: 33–36

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: any ethnicity 

Appearance: Sharp, composed, practical, with an understated presence.

Accent: Natural / Professional (Excellent vocal clarity and command).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Sam is a vital supporting role in the London section of the film. He is sharp, composed, practical, and deeply resourceful, living fluidly in the world of risk, law, finance, and damage control. When Marcus starts to unravel, Sam serves as a crucial grounding force—one of the few people speaking with absolute clarity in high-pressure rooms. He embodies loyalty without sentimentality, operating strictly in facts, consequences, and next strategic steps. He helps Marcus comprehend the true scale of his danger and ultimately becomes an instrumental part of his route back to freedom.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires strong vocal command and authority; the performer must feel vivid, distinct, and authoritative even during voice-only/telephone sequences.

- Must naturally project high intelligence and deep legal/financial literacy, moving fast without losing precision or showing panic.

- Performance requires an understated, subtle warmth hidden beneath a highly efficient, calm-under-pressure corporate demeanor.

topComments.text: Shooting a feature in three days is ambitious 🙃

PROJECT DETAILS

Project Title: TROM (working title) 

Casting Director: Kwaku Ankomah

Project Type: Feature Film (Filming in UK) 

Casting Location: Self-Tape / London, UK

Key Dates & Deadlines:

- Application Deadline: Sunday 19th July 2026 at 6:00 PM BST

- Self-Tape Audition Window: 18th – 21st July 2026

- Self-Tape Submission Deadline: Tuesday 21st July 2026 at 6:00 PM BST

- Live Chemistry Recalls (London): Saturday 25th or Sunday 26th July 2026 (TBC)

Production Dates: Friday 7th – Sunday 9th August 2026 (3 Shoot Days)

Location: London (including luxury penthouse & yacht locations)

Remuneration: £400.00 per day (Flat Fee). On-set catering and pre-approved travel expenses provided.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CHARACTER BREAKDOWNS (SPEAKING ROLES)

ROLE: KAREN

Playing Age: 24–26

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White British

Appearance: Polished, elegant, high-status ease.

Accent: Natural, contemporary British English (RP / upper-middle-class).

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

Karen is a major supporting role in the London section of the film. She is the affluent, polished, and affectionate girlfriend of the lead character, Marcus (a successful Ghanaian stockbroker). When an unexpected crisis forces Marcus to suddenly flee back to Ghana, Karen's secure world collapses.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires strong romantic chemistry and comfortable with kissing and luxury social scenes (yacht/penthouse).

- Requires excellent emotional range.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ROLE: JAMES

Playing Age: 33–36

Gender: Male

Ethnicity: White

Appearance: Well-groomed, sharp, masculine corporate ease.

Accent: Contemporary British English / Corporate London. 

CHARACTER SUMMARY:

James is part colleague, part mentor, and a firm floor favourite at the brokerage. He is a senior office figure who immediately recognizes and enjoys top-tier talent. In the opening London scenes, James’s interactions with Marcus are vital to establishing just how highly valued, admired, and celebrated Marcus is within the firm before the crisis hits. He speaks to Marcus as an equal with genuine professional respect and affection.

SCENE DEMANDS:

- Requires natural authority, warmth, and sharp wit.

- Strong onscreen chemistry with the actor playing Marcus to establish deep professional trust.

- Performance must be socially fluid, alive, and sharp—completely avoiding any stiff, bureaucratic corporate stereotypes.

items.text:
Why theatre is so important:

A study in The British Journal of Psychiatry found that people over 50 who attend arts events once a month reduce their risk of depression by 48%. 48%!!!!

https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/the-british-journal-of-psychiatry/article/cultural-engagement-and-incident-depression-in-older-adults-evidence-from-the-english-longitudinal-study-of-ageing/F25368CA79340C430B046A1DDDDC05B6?promo=27690

Research from the NEA shows that arts participation is associated with lower rates of loneliness, increased civic engagement, and greater life satisfaction.

And theatre specifically has been shown to enhance empathy and emotional intelligence—critical traits for strong relationships and thriving communities.

https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S002210312100038X?promo=27690

#theater #healing #psychiatry

Schaut  👀 doch mal rein:
Die zweite Ankündigung der „Summer Jump“ Konzerte von TRAIN45 am 4./5. Sept. in der Presse 🗞 ist raus: Herzlichen Dank 😘für die freundliche Unterstützung von Gisela Robben und dem Team des Sonntags Reports in Leer. Kulturell 🎶engagiert und ambitioniert, immer gut recherchiert und am „Puls der Zeit“:
So sollten Printmedien 📰 sein…! 

Karten für beide Konzerte bei:
Haushaltswaren Hibben ☎️ 0491-928690
Sievert Ahrend ☎️ 0491-3077, 
📱 0172-4579778, 
E-Mail: sievert.ahrend@gmx.de 

und, wenn noch vorhanden, an der Abendkasse.

All GUESTS Welcomed! 

 FOR EPISODE 6: The Turning Point✨

Can't Make This Up Podcast – LIVE
Monday, July 27th
7:00 PM PST | 10:00 PM EST
Please check your local times.

Every person has a story. Some make you laugh, some inspire you, some leave you wondering and excited. 

We're looking for actors, comedians, authors, musicians, entrepreneurs, artists, creators, and everyday people with unforgettable true stories to share.

This isn't just a podcast, we’re a family, we’re building a community, it's a conversation, a chance to connect, promote what you're working on, and inspire others through your journey. Meet amazing new people and returning guests.

Want to join? 
Email 
icantmakethisupodcast@gmail.com

Please like, share, and tag someone who has an incredible story.

Because the best stories... you really can't make up.🎬✨

sharedPost.text:
MONDAY MOTIVATION

A new week. A fresh start. Another chance to take one step closer to the career you've been dreaming of.

Every self-tape you film, every audition you attend, every email you send, every connection you make... it all adds up.

Success in this industry rarely happens overnight. It's built through consistency, resilience, and showing up even when nobody is watching.

So today:
🎬 Apply for that casting.
📸 Update your profile.
🎭 Learn something new.
🤝 Support a fellow creative.
💪 Believe in yourself, even if the industry hasn't caught up with your potential yet.

"Your next opportunity isn't waiting for perfection, it's waiting for you to take the first step. Keep showing up, because every audition, every connection, and every challenge is shaping the career you're meant to have."

— Casting Calls UK

👇 What's your biggest acting or industry goal this week? Share it below and let's support each other every step of the way!

#MondayMotivation #CastingCallsUK #ActorsLife #Casting #Film #TV #Theatre #CreativeCommunity #KeepGoing #DreamBig

items.text:
CASTING CALL [BACKGROUND EXTRAS]

*Please message me if you have any questions! I'm not able to reply to all comments here. Thanks!

Hey there! Plastic Monkey Films is looking for supporting artists / background extras for their independent feature film. 

Unpaid job, but no experience required, bring your mates, come have a drink, and help us fill out a pub!

Date: 5th August 2026
Location: Southend-on-Sea, Essex
Time: 12PM-4PM (TBC)

Please Facebook Messenger or email producer.plasticmonkeyfilms@gmail.com a picture of yourself and your profile (if you have one, if not just your name, age, height, and where you're based!) for consideration.

Thank you, and hope to see you on set! x

items.text: Gday Brighton actors. I am looking for a local Brighton-born (Thames Estuary accent) actress to assist me in reading for a 2 minute two hander scene to be recorded via Zoom (as I am in Australia). Your voice only will be recorded. I will pay 50 pounds for your time and I would only need approx 45 mins of it to be arrange at a time that suits us both. My page is jaymieknight.com. I require the scene for my Spotlight profile. Please DM me if any questions or reach out. Thank you.

items.text:
Posting for TxCo Productions
🎬 CASTING CALL – FAITH-BASED FILM

WHERE HE FELL

TxCo Productions is now casting for the upcoming faith-based short film Where He Fell. We are seeking talented actors who are passionate about meaningful storytelling and bringing powerful, faith-driven characters to life.

Whether you’re an experienced actor or an emerging performer looking to build your résumé, we’d love to hear from you!

✅Production Dates: TBD

✅Rate: Deferred Pay (day rate $200/day on set for Principle Cast; Supporting Cast $125/day; Background/Extras $50/day) Crew Deferred Pay Rate TBD depending on experience and equipment used)

✅Filming Locations: Colorado Springs; Loveland; Lake George, CO

✅Seeking Submissions from Colorado Springs and Denver areas. 

✅Must be willing to work as a local…NO TRAVEL Pay

Principal Roles

KURT – Male | Late 40s | White

A successful businessman, devoted Christian, happily married, and the loyal best friend of Jack. Compassionate, confident, and grounded in his faith.

JACK – Male | Late 40s | White

A man overwhelmed by life’s struggles. Recently unemployed and facing serious financial hardship, Jack is searching for hope and purpose.

OLD MAN – Male | Late 60s–Early 70s

A longtime coffee shop regular with a deep Christian faith. Wise, humble, and the great-grandson of Robert.

ROBERT – Male | Late 40s–50s

A weathered widower whose unwavering Christian faith has carried him through life’s greatest hardships.

HAROLD – Male | Mid 40s | White

A professional gambler and expert gunman—not a hired killer, just exceptionally skilled with firearms. Charismatic, independent, and determined to live life on his own terms.

Supporting Roles

LISA – Female | Mid 40s | White

A successful professional who has recently been promoted to Office Manager at a large corporation. Intelligent, driven, and supportive.

DOC – Male | Late 50s–Mid 60s

A respected small-town physician in the 1880s. Calm, compassionate, and trusted by the community.

PABLO ESCONDIDO – Male | Mid-Late 30s | Hispanic

Leader of the feared Escondido Gang. Strong, intimidating, and commanding. Long hair preferred.

COOK – Male | 50s–60s

Larger build with a scruffy, weathered appearance. A hardworking man shaped by years of life experiences.

SALOON PATRON – Male | 30s–40s

Average build. A believable Old West townsman.

PLAYER #1 – Male | 30s

Average build. Entitled, arrogant, and a poor loser during a poker game.

Background Roles

• Poker Players (3) late 20’s-50’s

• Townspeople (8–10) various ages

• Escondido Gang Members (3) late 20’s-40’s

🎥 Seeking actors who can authentically portray heartfelt modern day drama and compelling Old West characters.

To submit, please send:

• Recent headshot

• Acting résumé (if available)

• Demo reel (optional)

• Contact information

• The role(s) you’re interested in

Submit to email: TxCoProductions@gmail.com

Join us in telling a powerful story of faith, redemption, and second chances through Where He Fell.

#CastingCall #FaithBasedFilm #ChristianFilm #IndependentFilm #ActorsWanted #FilmCasting #WesternFilm #PeriodFilm #TxCoProductions #WhereHeFell #ColoradoActors #TexasActors #FilmAuditions

SALOON PATRON – Male | 30s–40s

Average build. A believable Old West townsman.

PLAYER #1 – Male | 30s

Average build. Entitled, arrogant, and a poor loser during a poker game.

Background Roles

• Poker Players (3) late 20’s-50’s

• Townspeople (8–10) various ages

• Escondido Gang Members (3) late 20’s-40’s

🎥 Seeking actors who can authentically portray heartfelt modern day drama and compelling Old West characters.

To submit, please send:

• Recent headshot

• Acting résumé (if available)

• Demo reel (optional)

• Contact information

• The role(s) you’re interested in

Submit to email: TxCoProductions@gmail.com

Join us in telling a powerful story of faith, redemption, and second chances through Where He Fell.

#CastingCall #FaithBasedFilm #ChristianFilm #IndependentFilm #ActorsWanted #FilmCasting #WesternFilm #PeriodFilm #TxCoProductions #WhereHeFell #ColoradoActors #TexasActors #FilmAuditions

items.text:
Für das studentische Abschlussprojekt **„Datensatz 27“** – ein atmosphärisches Sci-Fi-Kammerspiel im Found-Footage-Stil (ca. 90er/00er-Jahre-Ästhetik) – suchen wir unseren Hauptdarsteller.
* **Rolle:** DR. GABRIEL REHN (m, Spielalter ca. 28–40 Jahre).
* **Typus:** Ein analytischer, anfangs distanzierter Datenanalyst, der sich bei der Untersuchung eines städtischen Störsignals in eine manische, existenzielle Obsession hineinsteigert.
* **Anforderung:** Starke Textarbeit (Umgang mit wissenschaftlichem Vokabular, das in nackte Panik umschlägt) und nuanciertes Präsenzspiel (Mikromimik) vor einer statischen Kamera.
* **Projektart:** Studentischer Kurzfilm (Abschlussprojekt). Perfekt für das eigene Showreel auf High-End-Niveau.

Ansprechpartner: André

Rollen-/Anforderungsprofil

DR. GABRIEL REHN (männlich, Spielalter ca. 28–40 Jahre)

**Der Charakter:** Gabriel ist ein hochintelligenter, rationaler Datenanalyst. Zu Beginn des Films ist er der kühle, distanzierte Wissenschaftler im Dienst eines Großkonzerns – absolut kontrolliert und pragmatisch. Im Laufe der zwei Tage (erzählt über die 6 Logs) bricht sein wissenschaftliches Weltbild jedoch komplett zusammen. Er steigert sich in eine manische, existentielle Obsession hinein, als er begreift, dass der freie Wille eine mathematische Illusion ist. Er wird von der eigenen Matrix, die er untersucht, psychisch komplett gleichgeschaltet.

**Deine schauspielerische Herausforderung (Die Degeneration):** Da der Film als statisches Kammerspiel inszeniert wird, liegt die gesamte Dynamik auf deiner darstellerischen Präsenz. Gefragt ist ein extrem nuanciertes, starkes **„Show, don't tell“-Schauspiel**. Die emotionale Abwärtsspirale und der paranoide Kontrollverlust müssen primär über deine Mikromimik, deine Körperhaltung und eine brüchiger und panischer werdende Stimme spürbar werden.
* 
* **Die Anforderungen im Detail:**
   * **Exzellente Textarbeit:** Du musst komplexe, mathematisch-wissenschaftliche Fachbegriffe (*Shannon-Entropie, stochastische Prozesse, Autokorrelation*) absolut flüssig, organisch und glaubwürdig vortragen können – wie ein Profi, für den das alltägliche Routine ist.
   * **Starke Präsenz:** Die Fähigkeit, den psychologischen Verfall einer Figur über feine Nuancen spürbar zu machen, während man fast ausschließlich direkt vor einer statischen Kamera agiert.

Für einen Werbespot eines großen Lebensmitteldiscounters suche ich verschiedene Menschen türkischer Herkunft

Gerne kannst du dich zusammen mit deiner Familie bewerben denn ich suche folgende Personen:

Junge (11 - 15 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft der ein talentierter Fussballspieler ist

Vater (30-45 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

Mutter (30-45 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

Großmutter (60-75 Jahre alt) türkischer Herkunft

älterer Bruder/Schwester/Cousine / Cousin (15-19 Jahre alt)

Die Fakten zum Dreh:

Wann: wir drehen zwischen dem 22.-24.7. 2026

Wo: wir drehen in Tallin (Estland)

Wir bräuchten dich/euch zwischen dem 19.7. - 25.7. (inkl. An- Abreise / Fitting /Dreh)

Reise + Unterkunftskosten werden von der Produktion übernommen.

Schauspielerische Vorerfahrungen sind keine Voraussetzung. Es wird keinen Text geben der gelernt werden muss.

Pro Person gibt es (mit Drehhonorar + Buyout) mind. 2500 € (für die Rollen der Erwachsenen 3.500 € oder mehr)

Interesse?

Melde dich fix (spätestens bis zum 7.7.) mit einem Foto von dir per Mail bei: info@dokucasting.com

items.text:
# 🎬 Darsteller:innen gesucht (m/w/d) – Social Media Videos in Berlin

**Adash Agency | Berlin | Freelance / auf Projektbasis | 25 € pro Stunde**

## Du wolltest schon immer vor der Kamera stehen? Hier ist deine Ausrede.

Wir sind Adash – eine Berliner Kreativagentur, die Social-Media-Content produziert, der Leute tatsächlich zum Anhalten bringt. (Ja, das behaupten alle. Wir haben aber die Views, um es zu beweisen.)

Für unsere Video-Produktionen suchen wir Gesichter. Menschen, die vor der Kamera nicht einfrieren, sondern aufblühen. Schauspiel-Ausbildung? Brauchst du nicht. Instagram-Following? Egal. Was du brauchst, steht weiter unten – und es ist weniger, als du denkst.

## Was dich erwartet
* **Kurze, knackige Shootings:** ca. 2–3 Stunden pro Dreh. Kein 12-Stunden-Set, kein Warten im Regen.
* **Abwechslung, die süchtig macht:** Heute Streetwear-Brand, morgen Gastro, übermorgen Sanitärtechnik. Klingt random? Ist es auch – und genau deshalb wird es nie langweilig.
* **Alles ist vorbereitet:** Jeder Dreh läuft nach Plan und Skript. Du musst dir nichts ausdenken, nichts auswendig lernen wie im Theater – du bekommst klare Anweisungen und ein Team, das dich gut aussehen lässt.
* **Echtes Set-Feeling:** Professionelle Kamera, professionelle Crew, professioneller Content – und du mittendrin statt nur im Feed.
* **Content fürs eigene Portfolio:** Du sammelst Kamera-Erfahrung und Material, das du vorzeigen kannst.
## Was du mitbringen musst
* **Selbstbewusstsein.** Die Kamera merkt, ob du dich wohlfühlst. Du solltest Bock haben, gesehen zu werden.
* **Sicheres, sauberes Auftreten.** Pünktlich, zuverlässig, gepflegt – die Basics, die trotzdem nicht jeder draufhat.
* **Sonst: nichts.** Keine Vorkenntnisse, keine Schauspielschule, kein Showreel. Wir bringen dir alles bei, was du am Set wissen musst.
## Was du bekommst
* **25 € pro Stunde** – auch pauschal pro Shooting verhandelbar.
* Flexible Termine, die sich mit Studium, Job oder deinem Leben vereinbaren lassen.
* Ein Team, das Drehs ernst nimmt, sich selbst aber nicht zu ernst.
* Die Chance, regelmäßig gebucht zu werden, wenn's zwischen uns funkt.
## Wer wir sind

Adash Agency – Kreativ- und Social-Media-Agentur aus Berlin-Schöneberg. Wir produzieren Reels, Spots und Kampagnen für Marken aus Gastronomie, Handwerk, Fashion und allem dazwischen. Mit echter Crew, echten Darsteller:innen und Skripten, die auf Performance getrimmt sind.
## So bewirbst du dich

Kein Anschreiben. Kein Lebenslauf-Roman. Schick uns einfach:
1. **Ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo** (30–60 Sekunden, Handy reicht völlig): Wer bist du, warum willst du vor die Kamera?
2. **2–3 aktuelle Fotos** von dir.

📩 **[kontakt@adashcreatives.com](mailto:burc@adashcreatives.com)** 
📱 Instagram: **@Adash.Agency** 
📍 Shootings in Berlin

Wir melden uns bei allen zurück, die uns catchen. Und wenn du bis hierhin gelesen hast, ohne wegzuscrollen – gutes Zeichen. Genau diese Aufmerksamkeit wollen wir auch in unseren Videos.

topComments.text: Hat schon Text oder ohne Text? Ich möchte gerne teilnehmen.

ADASH SUCHT GESICHTER Für Social-Media-Drehs in Berlin Content, der Leute wirklich stoppen lässt. 2-3 Std. pro proDreh 25€/Std. 25 Std. Keine Ertahrung nötig Flexible lerm лe pizz Plan & Skript lusive DU BRAUCHST Regelmäßige Bookingsmöglich BEWIRBST DICH Selbstbewusstsein sein Selbstbe SauberesAuftreten 0ס Zuver rlässigkeit Kein TAKT ben 30-60 Sek Video 3aktuelleFot Fotos K ontakt@adashu shcreative .com Irstagram:@Adesh.Agency Instagram: @Adssh.Agency Shootingsin Bertin HEUTE IST DEIN UMZUGSTAG ADASH Wirmeldenunsbialanrnamin uns melden catchen gelesen gutesZeichen, 4,8 STERNE +3500 BEWERTUNGEN ECHTE DREHS. items.text:
Akut i morgen torsdag den 16. Juli. 
På vegne af en anden:

STATISTER SØGES TIL NY DANSK MUSIKVIDEO I KØBENHAVN (ULØNNET) 

Vi søger statister til optagelser torsdag d. 16. juli. Alle medvirkende bruges på dagen, men i forskellige tidsrum afhængigt af scenen.

Medvirken er ulønnet, men vi sørger selvfølgelig for forplejning til alle deltagere!

Vi søger:

Børn (7-12 år) 08.30-14.30 (man kan eventuelt være med fra 11:00-14:30 hvis man ikke har mulig for at deltage fra 8:30)

Vi søger en masse børn, som skal medvirke som elever i scener, der foregår på en skole

En forælder eller anden værge er meget velkommen til at være med under optagelserne. Vi har desuden en børneansvarlig, som sørger for, at alle børn har det godt og hjælper med at holde styr på gruppen. 

Alle børn skal have skriftlig tilladelse fra deres forældre eller værger, før de kan deltage.

Unge (18-25 år) med studenterhue (alle slags) Kl. 14.30-16.30

Vi søger unge med studenterhuer til en scene med festlig sommerstemning. Vi ser ikke navnene på studenterhuen, så hvis du kan anskaffe dig en hue og har lyst til at lege student i et par timer, så er du velkommen! 

"Foodtruck ejer + gæster" (Alle aldre 18+) 16.30-19.00

Vi søger 3-5 personer, som skal medvirke i en scene ved en foodtruck. Nogle skal forestille at arbejde i foodtrucken, mens andre skal være gæster i kø. 

Har du lyst til at deltage eller høre mere, så send en mail til:

brabrandcreative@gmail.com

Skriv gerne:

• Dit navn
• Din alder
• Hvilken rolle du er interesseret i (barn, student eller foodtruck)
• Et vellignende billede af dig selv
• Dit telefonnummer

Man må meget gerne melde sig til med sine venner eller familie. 

Vi glæder os til en sjov optagedag! 🎥✨

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic
